jobs.title: Apprenti(e) Employé(e) de Commerce 2026-2029
jobs.description:
Mission 
 L'UBP vous permet d'avoir une vue d'ensemble du domaine bancaire et d'acquérir des compétences précieuses pour votre future carrière. 
 
 Main responsibilities 

Durant vos 3 années d'apprentissage, vous aurez l'opportunité de découvrir divers métiers de la banque privées, tels que les Opérations, les Crédits, le conseil à la clientèle ou la Salle des marchés. Ce sont les compétences de ses collaborateurs qui font le succès d'une entreprise et nous vous offrirons les outils, les connaissances, le support et les formations nécessaires pour réussir dans le monde bancaire et au-delà.
L'UBP est une banque de premier ordre en matière d'apprentissage, cela se traduit notamment par un taux élevé de réussite aux examens finaux. 
 
 Your Profile 
 Vous allez obtenir le certificat de fin d'école obligatoire à la fin de cette année scolaire ou l'avez obtenu récemment;
 Très bonne capacités d'apprentissage et d'organisation;
 Bon relationnel;
 Bonne maîtrise du français et de l'anglais, toute autre langue étant un atout. 
 
 Others 
 Swiss Residence 
 Votre candidature doit impérativement comporter: Lettre de motivation 
 Curriculum vitae 
 Bulletins scolaires de l'enseignement secondaire (ou équivalent) des 3 dernières années, y compris celui de l'année en cours 
 Attestation de stage ou certificat de travail (si disponible) 
 Copies des diplômes obtenus (si disponible) 
 Résultat de tout test effectuté (EVA, Multicheck, etc.) 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Mission UBP ti permette di avere una panoramica del campo bancario e acquisire competenze preziose per la tua futura carriera. ## Principali responsabilitÃ Durante i tuoi 3 anni di apprendimento, avrai l'opportunitÃ di scoprire varie professioni private bancarie, come operazioni, crediti, consulenza clienti o il Market Hall. Sono le competenze dei suoi dipendenti che rendono un'azienda di successo e vi offriremo gli strumenti, la conoscenza, il supporto e la formazione necessari per avere successo nel mondo bancario e oltre. UBP è una banca di apprendimento leader, con un alto tasso di successo negli esami finali. ## Il tuo profilo Otterrete il certificato di partenza della scuola obbligatoria alla fine di questo anno scolastico o l'avete recentemente ottenuto; Buona relazione; buon comando di francese e inglese, qualsiasi altra lingua è un bene. ## Other Swiss Residence ## La tua domanda deve includere: Curriculum vitae Secondary (o equivalente) bollettini scolastici per gli ultimi 3 anni, compreso il Certificato di Internship o Work Certificate (se disponibile) Copie di diplomi ottenuti (se disponibile) Risultato di qualsiasi test eseguito (EVA, Multicheck, ecc.) ## Competenze di base Aderenza alla società
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission UBP allows you to have an overview of the banking field and gain valuable skills for your future career. ## Main responsibilities During your 3 years of learning, you will have the opportunity to discover various private banking professions, such as Operations, Credits, Customer Advice or the Market Hall. It is the skills of its employees that make a company successful and we will offer you the tools, knowledge, support and training necessary to succeed in the banking world and beyond. UBP is a leading learning bank, with a high success rate in the final exams. ## Your Profile You will obtain the compulsory school leaving certificate at the end of this school year or have recently obtained it; Very good learning and organizational skills; Good relationship; Good command of French and English, any other language being an asset. ## Other Swiss Residence ## Your application must include: Curriculum vitae Secondary (or equivalent) school bulletins for the last 3 years, including the current year's Certificate of Internship or Work Certificate (if available) Copies of diplomas obtained (if available) Result of any test performed (EVA, Multicheck, etc.) ## Core Competencies Adherence to the company
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission UBP ermöglicht es Ihnen, einen Überblick über das Bankenfeld zu haben und wertvolle Fähigkeiten für Ihre zukünftige Karriere zu gewinnen. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Während Ihres 3jährigen Lernens haben Sie die Möglichkeit, verschiedene private Bankenberufe wie Operationen, Credits, Kundenberatung oder die Markthalle zu entdecken. Es sind die Fähigkeiten seiner Mitarbeiter, die ein Unternehmen erfolgreich machen und wir bieten Ihnen die Werkzeuge, Wissen, Unterstützung und Ausbildung notwendig, um in der Bankenwelt und darüber hinaus erfolgreich zu sein. UBP ist eine führende Lernbank mit einer hohen Erfolgsquote in den Abschlussprüfungen. Ihr Profil Sie erhalten das Pflichtschulzeugnis am Ende dieses Schuljahres oder haben es vor kurzem erworben; Sehr gutes Lernen und organisatorische Fähigkeiten; Gute Beziehung; Gutes Kommando von Französisch und Englisch, jede andere Sprache ist ein Vermögen. jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Banking Operations Officer
jobs.description:
Main Responsibilities 

 The banking operations officer is responsible for the day-to-day activity, control and oversight of the BAU activity as directed by their reporting line. 
 The role requires the candidate to support the banking operations department across numerous activities as required by their manager, to deliver high quality standards of work. This presents the opportunity to demonstrate existing knowledge, in addition to being presented with the opportunity to upskill on other areas within the department. 
 It is critical to remain positive and proactive in this role, supporting colleagues and having a desire to increase their own knowledge and support others. 
 Support of constant improvement initiatives and projects will be required from time to time. 
 Role Duties 

 The local Banking Operation department is divided into two separate teams as detailed below : Banking & Treasury UK Domestic payments (Sterling) 
 Direct Debits & Standing orders 
 Cheque clearing 
 Treasury support activities 
 
 Client reporting, online banking & Debit cards Client reporting, including valuations and mailings 
 Individual Savings Account controls - ISA 
 Client debit card support and helpline 
 Online banking support and helpline 
 Management of physical documents (mail / archives) 
 
 
 The successful candidate will initially join an area which makes best use of their skillset and experience, with a later consideration to crosstrain as required by the bank. 
 Important to support colleagues within banking operations and work with a one team approach. 
 Proactively manage Risks and Issues arising within the banking operations scope 
 Produce KPI’s for banking operations and provide periodic reporting against KPI’s for Senior Management as defined 
 Support the business with development of operational solutions for new products or services in conjunction with the Operational teams at Union Bancaire Privee SA 
 Ensure operational functions meet relevant regulatory requirements at all times 
 Perform all duties in accordance with the principles outlined in the UBP UK Code of Conduct, as well as the policies and procedures relevant to the role, adhering to a culture that focuses on minimising risks and delivering value 

 Ensure adherence to UBP Internal controls standards, systems and procedures that appropriate standards are maintained in all aspects of operational risk and compliance which are endorsed by subsequent audits. 
 

 The job description is not exhaustive and may include other duties as assigned from time to time by management. 
 Committee Membership 

 None 
 Conduct Rules 

 This role is required to comply with the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) Individual Conduct Rules, which are: 
 
 To act with integrity; 
 To act with due skill, care and diligence; 
 To be open and cooperative with the FCA, the Prudential Regulation Authoritity (PRA) and other regulators; 
 To pay due regard to the interests of customers and treat them fairly; 
 To observe proper standards of market conduct; and 
 To act to deliver good outcomes for retain customers. 
 
 Person Specification 

 Knowledge, Skills & Experience 

 At least 8 years working in a similar operational role, able to demonstrate technical knowledge across banking operations. 
 A min of 3 years working with critical outsource/service providers. 
 Able to engage at all levels and build strong relationships across jurisdictions. 
 Proactive, positive and solutions focused. 
 Competencies and Values Required Level 

 
 Shows the drive to perform and be successful 5 
 Persistent in following up on issues 5 
 Upholds the legal, regulatory and ethical standard of the UBP Group 4 
 Good product knowledge 4 
 Knowledge of legal regulatory and industry requirements 4 
 Business Development 4 
 Communication - listening, written and verbal with clients 4 
 Influencing 4 
 Knowledge of Products and Services 4 
 Relationship Building - internal and external 4 
 Strategic & commercial awareness 4 
 Planning & organising 4 
 Ethics and values 4 
 Customer focus 4 
 
 Explanation: 1: low level of competence / skill required, 2-3: average level of competence / skill required, 4-5: high level of competence skill required

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: IT Business Analyst - Risk Management

titleByLocale.fr: Analyste des activités de TI - Gestion des risques

jobs.description:
Mission 
 The mission consists in performing the role of IT business analyst for Risk applications, in particular for subjects related to Balance Sheet Management, Value At Risk (VaR), Reconciliation and IRRBB / CSRBB regulations. 
 The candidate needs to have an extensive IT risk management banking background as well as a strong BA experience. 
 

 Main responsibilities 
 Reporting to the Team Lead of IT Risk, Credit & ESG, the consultant will work on risk application projects. 
 
 IT BA Responsibilities 
 Analyse regulation, business scenarios/cases and contribute to business / regulatory requirements definition. Eg : Impact of products evolution (Acumulator / Decumulator, Deposits, Credit and Mortgages) on the Balance Sheet Management (BSM) IT treatment 
 
 Define Functional Design Specification. 
 Manage vendor (FIS) application relationship (software package). 
 Execute database scripts and queries (SQL) to validate data integrity and ensure alignment with regulatory requirements. 
 Install and test new versions of BSM and VaR Hedge Funds Applications and exploit the applications in production (batch error management). 
 Liaise with the business to provide guidance from an IT point of view. 
 Provide guidance for business analysts, developers, and testers assigned to the projects and ensure good project management practices are employed throughout the project lifecycle. 
 Identify key risks and issues and define mitigation scenarios. 
 

 
 Your Profile 
 5 to 10 years of experience 
 Education : Master Degree in IT 
 

 Experience required 
 IT Business Analyst with strong technical and functional skills on Risk Management – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (based on MATLAB) 
 Proficient in SQL and database scripting for risk data analytics. 
 Good understanding of the bank’s business processes 
 Good operational experience in the implementation of various IT Risk Management projects in banking or financial sectors related to risk management, VaR reconciliation, IRRBB (Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Book) / CSRBB (Credit Spread Risk in the Banking Book) regulations. 
 Good practrice of IT BA activities and knowledge of IT project management 
 

 Languages: 
 French mandatory and English (C1) 
 

 Others 
 Swiss residency: Optional

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione - La missione consiste nel ricoprire il ruolo di IT business analyst per le applicazioni di rischio, in particolare per quanto riguarda la Gestione del Bilancio, al Value At Risk (VaR), alla Reconciliazione e alle normative IRRBB / CSRBB. ## Mansioni pr - Reporting al Team Lead di IT Risk, Credit & ESG, il consulente lavorerà su progetti di applicazioni di rischio. ## Responsabilità di IT Business Analyst - Analizzare le normative, le scene/casi aziendali e contribuire alla definizione dei requisiti di business/regolatori. Esempio: Impatto dell'evoluzione dei prodotti (Acumulator / Decumulator, Depositi, Crediti e Mutui) sul trattamento IT della Gestione del Bilancio (BSM) - Definire le Specifiche di Progettazione Funzionale. - Gestire la relazione con il fornitore (FIS) dell'applicazione software (software package). - Eseguire script e query di database (SQL) per validare l'ordine dei dati e garantire l'allineamento con i requisiti regolatori. - Installare e testare le nuove versioni delle Applicazioni BSM e VaR Hedge Funds e sfruttarle in produzione (gestione degli errori batch). - Collaborare con il business per fornire indicazioni dal punto di vista IT. - Fornire indicazioni agli analisti di business, agli sviluppatori e ai tester assegnati ai progetti e assicurarsi che le buone pratiche di gestione di progetto devono essere prese durante tutto il ciclo di vita del progetto. - Identificare i rischi e le problematiche chiave e definire scenari di mitigazione. ## Profilo richiesto - 5 a 10 anni di esperienza - Laurea magistrale in IT ## Esperienza richiesta - IT Business Analyst con competenze tecniche e funzionali in Gestione del Rischio – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (basato su MATLAB) - Competenza in SQL e scripting di database per l'analisi dei dati di rischio. - Buona conoscenza dei processi bancari - Buona esperienza operativa nell'implementazione di vari progetti di Gestione del Rischio IT in settori bancari o finanziari alla gestione del rischio, alla riconciliazione del VaR, alle normative IRRBB (Interest Rate Risk in Banking Book) / CSRBB (Credit Spread Risk in the Banking Book). - Buone pratiche di attività di IT BA e conoscenza della gestione di progetti IT # Lingue - Francese legale e inglese (C1) ## Altro - Residenza svizzera: Opzionale

Esempio: Impatto dell'evoluzione dei prodotti (Acumulator / Decumulator, Depositi, Crediti e Mutui) sul trattamento IT della Gestione del Bilancio (BSM) - Definire le Specifiche di Progettazione Funzionale. - Gestire la relazione con il fornitore (FIS) dell'applicazione Software (Softwarepaket). - Eseguire Script e query di Datenbank (SQL) per validare l'integrità dei dati e garantire l'allineamento con i requisiti regolatori. - Installare e testare le nuove versioni delle Applicazioni BSM e VaR Hedge Funds e sfruttarle in produzione (gestione degli errori batch). - Collaborare con business per fornire indicazioni dal punto di vista IT. - Fornire indicazioni agli analisti di business, agli sviluppatori e ai tester assegnati ai progetti e assicurarsi che le buone pratiche di gestione di progetto siano adottate durante tutto il ciclo di vita del progetto. - Identificare i rischi e le problematiche chiave e definire scenari di mitigazione. Profilo richiesto - 5 a 10 anni di esperienza - Laurea magistrale in IT Esperienza richiesta - IT Business Analyst con forti konkurrierennze tecniche e funzionali in Gestione del Rischio – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (basato su MATLAB) - Competenio in SQL e scripting di Datenbank per l'ti - Buona conoscenza dei processi aziendali bancari - Buona esperienza operativa nell'implementazione di vari progetti di Gestione del Rischio IT in settori bancari o finanziari relativi alla gestione del rischio, alla riconciliazione del VaR, alle normative IRRBB (Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Booking) - Buone pratiche di attività di IT BA e conoscenza della gestione di progetti IT Lingue - Francese obbligatorio e inglese (C1)
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missione - La mission consiste en nel ricoprre il ruolo di IT business analyste per le applicazioni di rischio, in particolare per argomenti relativi alla Gestione del Bilancio, al Value At Risk (VaR), alla Reconciliazione e alle normative IRRBB / CSRBB. ## Mansioni principali - Reporting al Team Lead di IT Risk, Credit & ESG, il consulte lavorerà su progetti di applicazioni di rischio. ## Responsabilità di IT Business Analyst - Analizzare le normatif, le scenari/casi aziendali e contribuer alla definizione dei requisiti di business/regolatori. Esempio: Impatto dell'evoluzione dei prodotti (Acumulateur / Décumulateur, Depositi, Crediti e Mutui) sul trattamento IT della Gestione del Bilancio (BSM) - Définir le Spécifique di Progettazione Funzionale. - Gestire la relazione con il fornitore (FIS) logiciel dell'applicationazione (paquet logiciel). - Eseguire script e requête di database (SQL) per validare l'integrità dei dati e garantie l'allineamento con i requisiti regolatori. - Installare e testare le nuove versioni delle Applicazioni BSM e VaR Hedge Funds e sfruttarle in produzione (gestione degli errori batch). - Collaborare con il business per fornire indicazioni dal punto di vista IT. - Fornire indicazioni agli analisti di business, agli sviluppatori e ai tester assegnati ai progetti e assicurarsi che le buone pratiche di gestione di progetto siano adottate dure tutto il ciclo di vita del progetto. - Identificare i rischi e le problematiche chiave e definire scenari di mitigazione. ## Profilo richiesto - 5 a 10 ans di espérienza - Laurea magistrale in IT ## Esperienza richiesta - IT Business Analyst con forti concurrence tecniche e funzionali in Gestione del Rischio – FIS Balance Sheet Manager – Var HF & Reconciliation (basato su MATLAB) - Competenza in SQL e scripting di database per l'analisi dei dati di rischio. - Buona conoscenza dei processi aziendali bancari - Buona esperienza opérativa nell'implementazione di vari progetti di Gestione del Rischio IT in settori bancari o finanziari relati alla gestione del rischio, alla riconciliazione del VaR, alle normative IRRBB (Intérest Rate Risk in the Banking Book) / CSRBB (Credit Spread Risk in the Banking Book). - Buone pratiche di attività di IT BA e conoscenza della gestione di progetti IT ## Lingue - Francese obbligatorio e inglese (C1) ## Altro - Residenza svizzera: Opzionale

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: IT Business Analyst - Credit (IT)
jobs.description:
Mission 
 The mission consists in performing the role of IT business analyst for key credit applications and projects 
 
 Main responsibilities: 

 Reporting to the Team Lead of IT Risk, Credit & ESG, the consultant will work on key credit applications projects. 
 

 BA Responsibilities: 
 Analyse business scenarios/cases and contribute to business requirements definition. 
 Define Functional Design Specification. 
 Manage vendor application (SpeciTec) relationship (software package Specicred ). 
 Install and test new version of Specicred. 
 Execute database scripts and queries (SQL) to validate data integrity and ensure alignment with regulatory requirements. 
 Liaise with the business to provide guidance from an IT point of view. 
 Provide guidance for business analysts, developers, and testers assigned to the projects and ensure good project management practices are employed throughout the project lifecycle. 
 Identify key risks and issues and define mitigation scenarios. 
 

 Your Profile 
 5 to 10 years of experience 
 Education : Master Degree in IT 
 

 Experience required 
 Strong experience required: IT Business Analyst with strong technical and functional skills on Credit projects 

 Good understanding of the bank’s business processes 

 Good operational experience in the implementation of various IT Credit projects 
 

 Languages: 
 French mandatory and English (C1) 
 

 Others 
 Swiss residency: Mandatory

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Tax Specialist (Temporary 8 months)
jobs.description:
Mission 
 
 As part of the Tax Services team, the Tax and Documentation Specialist is a key element to ensure the quality and accuracy of the US and CRS reporting done by the Bank, in an environment which is subject to constant changes and evolutions. The employee’s mission also includes investigation and follow up on requests from internal/external auditors, authorities and Relationship managers. 
 
 Main duties 
 Participate in the Data preparation and validation for reportings such as FATCA/CRS 

 QI/FATCA/CRS Data quality control, Reconciliation and Reporting 

 Manage the documentation and indicia Dashboard for the WM. Provide relevant support, monitoring and required IT improvements. 

 Answer inquiries in relation to withholding taxes including QI/FATCA and CRS 

 Provide support to the front office about QI/FATCA and CRS 

 Perform regular controls on transactions and codification in our systems to ensure that the tax is properly levied and reported. 

 Monitoring and control of FATCA/CRS client documentation and change in circumstances 

 Follow up on requests from internal/external auditors, authorities 
 

 Core competencies 
 
 Skills & Abilities: 
 Good knowledge of the financial products and associated transactions
 Knowledge of US and CRS reporting rules (Optional)
 1-3 years of experience in Tax Operation team or equivalent
 Strong analytical skills, able to make complex data reconciliation
 Ability to efficiently manage priorities
 Be able to work independently but also as a team
 Fluent in French and English
 Open mind and team orientation: 
 Be open to other’s ideas.
 Always balance personal and team interests keeping in mind that the Bank’s interest are the priority.
 Express and accept constructive criticism.
 Innovation and development: 
 Propose and seek improvement of the current tools and processes.
 Be positive towards change and seek opportunities to improve the quality of the working environment.
 Conitunuously work on knowledge improvement.
 Corporate culture: 
 Be ‘solution oriented’ and have a strong sense of customer services.
 Be proactive and driven.
 Developp and maintain a relationship network within the various Bank departments.
 Comply consistently with internal and external regulations.

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Nell'ambito del team Tax Services, il Tax and Documentation Specialist è un elemento chiave per garantire la qualità e l'accuratezza della segnalazione degli Stati Uniti e del CRS effettuata dalla Banca, in un ambiente soggetto a costanti cambiamenti ed evoluzioni. La missione del dipendente comprende anche le indagini e seguire le richieste di revisori interni/esterni, autorità e responsabili delle relazioni. ## Mansioni principato - Partecipa alla preparazione e alla validazione dei dati per report come FATCA/CRS - QI/FATCA/CRS Controllo qualità dei dati, Riconciliazione e Reporting - Gestire la documentazione e indicia Dashboard per il WM. Fornire supporto, monitoraggio e miglioramenti IT richiesti. - Rispondere alle richieste in relazione alle imposte di mantenimento, tra cui QI/FATCA e CRS - Fornire supporto all'ufficio anteriore su QI/FATCA e CRS - Eseguire controlli regolari sulle transazioni e la codificazione nei nostri sistemi per garantire che l'imposta sia correttamente levied e segnalato. - Monitoraggio e controllo della documentazione dei clienti FATCA/CRS e cambiamento delle circostanze - Seguire le richieste di revisori interni/esterni, autorità ## Competenze chiave ## Skills & Abilities: - Buona conoscenza dei prodotti finanziari e delle transazioni associate - Conoscenza delle regole di reporting degli Stati Uniti e del CRS (opzionale) - 1-3 anni di esperienza nel team di Operazione fiscale o equivalente - Forte competenze analitiche, in grado di rendere complessa riconciliazione dei dati - Capacità Essere in grado di lavorare in modo indipendente ma anche come squadra - fluente in francese e inglese ## Apri la mente e l'orientamento di squadra: - Sii aperto alle idee altrui. - No. Sempre bilanciare gli interessi personali e di squadra tenendo presente che l’interesse della Banca è la priorità. - Esprimere e accettare critiche costruttive. ### Innovazione e sviluppo: - Proporre e cercare il miglioramento degli strumenti e dei processi attuali. - Siate positivi verso il cambiamento e cercate opportunità per migliorare la qualità dell'ambiente di lavoro. - Lavorare costantemente al miglioramento della conoscenza. #### Cultura aziendale: - Essere orientata alla soluzione e avere un forte senso dei servizi del cliente. - Sii proattivo e guidato. - Sviluppare e mantenere una rete di relazioni all'interno dei vari dipartimenti bancari. - Complessivamente con normative interne ed esterne.

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Im Rahmen des Tax Services Teams ist der Tax and Documentation Specialist ein Schlüsselelement, um die Qualität und Genauigkeit der US- und CRS-Berichte der Bank in einem Umfeld zu gewährleisten, das ständigen Veränderungen und Entwicklungen unterliegt. Die Mission des Mitarbeiters umfasst auch Untersuchung und Weiterverfolgung von Anträgen von internen/externen Auditoren, Behörden und Beziehungsmanagern. Mansioni principali - Nehmen Sie an der Datenvorbereitung und Validierung für Berichterstattungen wie FATCA/CRS teil - QI/FATCA/CRS Datenqualitätskontrolle, Versöhnung und Reporting - Verwalten Sie die Dokumentation und Indicia Dashboard für die WM. Stellen Sie relevante Unterstützung, Überwachung und erforderliche IT-Verbesserungen zur Verfügung. - Beantworten Sie Anfragen in Bezug auf die Quellensteuer einschließlich QI/FATCA und CRS - Unterstützung bei der Frontstelle über QI/FATCA und CRS - Führen Sie regelmäßige Kontrollen über Transaktionen und Kodifizierung in unseren Systemen, um sicherzustellen, dass die Steuer ordnungsgemäß erhoben und gemeldet wird. - Überwachung und Kontrolle der FATCA/CRS-Clientdokumentation und -änderung unter Umständen - Folgen Sie auf Anfragen von internen/externen Auditoren, Behörden \ Competenze chiave ### Fähigkeiten & Fähigkeiten: - Gute Kenntnisse der Finanzprodukte und damit verbundenen Transaktionen - Kenntnisse der US- und CRS-Reporting-Regeln (Optional) - 1-3 Jahre Erfahrung im Steuerbetriebsteam oder gleichwertig - Starke analytische Fähigkeiten, in der Lage, komplexe Datenabgleichung - Fähigkeit, effizient zu verwalten Prioritäten Seien Sie in der Lage, unabhängig zu arbeiten, aber auch als Team - Flöten in Französisch und Englisch ### Offene Meinung und Teamorientierung: - Seien Sie offen für andere Ideen. - Ja. Berücksichtigen Sie immer, dass das Interesse der Bank die Priorität hat. - Express und akzeptieren konstruktive Kritik. ### Innovation und Entwicklung: - Anlehnen und suchen Verbesserung der aktuellen Werkzeuge und Prozesse. Seien Sie positiv auf Veränderungen und suchen Sie Möglichkeiten, die Qualität des Arbeitsumfelds zu verbessern. - Konkrete Arbeit an der Wissensverbesserung. ### Unternehmenskultur: - Seien Sie ‘Lösung orientiert’ und haben ein starkes Gefühl der Kundendienste. - Sei proaktiv und getrieben. - Developp und Aufrechterhaltung eines Beziehungsnetzwerks innerhalb der verschiedenen Bankabteilungen. - Konsistent mit internen und externen Vorschriften.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missione Dans le cadre de l'équipe des Services fiscaux, le spécialiste de l'impôt et de la documentation est un élément clé pour assurer la qualité et l'exactitude des rapports des États-Unis et du CS Ex effectués par la Banque, dans un environnement qui est soumis à des changements et des évolutions constants. La mission de l'employé comprend également les enquêtes et le suivi des demandes des vérificateurs internes et externes, des autorités et des gestionnaires des relations. ## Mansioni principali - Participer à la préparation et à la validation des données pour les rapports tels que FATCA/CRS - QI/FATCA/CRS Contrôle de la qualité des données, rapprochement et rapports - Gérer la documentation et le tableau de bord Indicia pour le WM. Fournir le soutien, le suivi et les améliorations nécessaires en matière de TI. - Répondre aux demandes de renseignements concernant les retenues d'impôt, y compris la QI/FATCA et le CS Ex - Fournir du soutien au bureau principal au sujet de la QI/FATCA et du CS Ex - Effectuer des contrôles réguliers des opérations et de la codification dans nos systèmes pour s'assurer que la taxe est prélevée et déclarée correctement. - Surveillance et contrôle de la documentation sur les clients de la FATCA/SCR et changement de circonstances - Suivi des demandes des vérificateurs internes/externes, des autorités ## Competenze chiave ### Compétences et capacités : - Bonne connaissance des produits financiers et des transactions connexes - Connaissance des règles de déclaration des états-Unis et du SCR (facultatif) - 1 à 3 ans d'expérience dans l'équipe de l'opération fiscale ou l'équivalent - Fortes compétences analytiques, capables de faire un rapprochement complexe des données - Capacité de gérer efficacement les priorités - Être capable de travailler indépendamment mais aussi en équipe - Fluent en français et en anglais ### Esprit ouvert et orientation de l'équipe : - Être ouvert aux autres idées. - Oui. Toujours équilibrer les intérêts personnels et d'équipe en gardant à l'esprit que les intérêts de la Banque sont la priorité. - Exprimer et accepter des critiques constructives. ### Innovation et développement: - Proposer et chercher à améliorer les outils et les processus actuels. - Soyez positif envers le changement et cherchez des occasions d'améliorer la qualité de l'environnement de travail. - Travailler ensemble à l'amélioration des connaissances. ### Culture d'entreprise: - Être orienté vers la solution et avoir un fort sens des services à la clientèle. - Soyez proactif et motivé. - Développer et maintenir un réseau de relations au sein des différents services de la Banque. - Respecter les règlements internes et externes.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Team leader - IT Compliance
jobs.description:
Mission: 
 Team leader of the IT Compliance unit ensuring the delivery and operations of all the services used by the bank Compliance entities at Group and Branch levels 
 In charge of managing a team of 11 IT specialists composed of business analysts and project managers 
 

 Key responsibilities: 
 Manage the daily operations of the team and the related services to meet the expected level of quality 
 Manage the portfolio of projects and ensure the proper delivery on time by meeting the business requirements within the approved budget 
 Manage the team OPEX and CAPEX budgets within the approved envelopes 
 Manage the team resources by setting individual objectives and developing their career path 
 

 Specific Competencies and other Skills/Abilities: 
 Master Degree in IT Engineering or equivalent. 
 A minimum of 10 years’ experience as IT Team Lead in a banking organization 
 Functional knowledge of Compliance, KYC, AML and regulatory reporting topics in the context of Private Banking 
 Technical knowledge of the IMTF AML and risk scoring solutions 
 Capacity to deal with several matters simultaneously 
 Ability to work independently, take decisions and set priorities 
 Pragmatic and solution oriented 
 Strong leadership, analytical and communication skills, ability to interact at management level with key bank stakeholders 
 Fluent in French and English; additional languages are considered an asset 
 Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility 
 
 Others Swiss Residence 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Middle Officer
jobs.description:
Mission 
 The Middle Officer in Asset Management acts as the central point of contact for operational queries, ensuring timely client responses and smooth transaction processing. Key responsibilities include trade matching, settlement follow-up, daily reconciliations, collateral management, and issue resolution. The role also involves producing activity reports, collaborating with counterparties, and implementing new processes to enhance operational efficiency. 
 

 Main responsibilities 
 Act as the central point of contact for operational queries, and always available to respond to our client queries in a timely manner 

 Securities & FX trade matching, instruction to relevant third parties and settlement follow-up 

 OTC & ETD trade matching, and clearing monitoring 

 Produce the daily activity reports to third parties 

 Perform daily reconciliations of portfolio positions, cash balances and transactions. 

 Breaks analysis, investigation until resolution 

 Participation in the implementation of new processes and controls 

 Oversee the daily management of collateral for derivatives 

 Perform daily reconciliations of collateral balances with counterparties, resolving discrepancies in a timely manner. 

 Collaborate with counterparties, clearing brokers, and custodians to ensure smooth collateral movements and settlements. 
 

 Your Profile 
 +5 years of experience in Asset Management / Operations or FX activities 
 University degree(s) in accounting, finance and/or business management 
 Strong knowledge of fund structures, share class operations, and regulatory frameworks (e.g., EMIR, UCITS, AIFMD). 

 Deep understanding of currency markets, hedging instruments (e.g., forwards, swaps), and collateral management practices. 

 Specific competencies 
 Strong Analytical skills and problem-solving skills. 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate across teams. 
 High attention to detail and ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment. 
 Awareness of risks and focus on risks mitigation techniques 
 Rigour and organization skills 
 Result oriented, driven to succeed 
 Ability to work in a dynamic, high demand environment 
 Fluent in French and English, other language(s) a plus 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver results within tight deadlines. 
 Proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement and innovation. 
 Swiss residency 
 

 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Il Middle Officer in Asset Management funge da punto di contatto centrale per le richieste operative, garantendo risposte tempestive ai clienti e un'elaborazione fluida delle transazioni. Le responsabilità principali includono l'abbinamento commerciale, il follow-up del regolamento, le riconciliazioni quotidiane, la gestione delle garanzie e la risoluzione dei problemi. Il ruolo prevede anche la produzione di report di attività, la collaborazione con le controparti e l'implementazione di nuovi processi per migliorare l'efficienza operativa. ## Mansioni principali - Agire come punto di contatto centrale per le richieste operative e sempre disponibile a rispondere alle richieste dei nostri clienti in modo tempestivo - Confronto tra titoli e FX, istruzioni a terze parti rilevanti e follow-up del regolamento - Confronto commerciale OTC e ETD e monitoraggio della compensazione - Produrre i rapporti giornalieri di attività a terzi - Eseguire riconciliazioni giornaliere di posizioni di portafoglio, saldi di cassa e transazioni - Analisi delle rotture, indagini fino alla risoluzione - Partecipazione all'implementazione di nuovi processi e controlli - Sorvegliare la gestione quotidiana delle garanzie per i derivati - Eseguire riconciliazioni giornaliere dei saldi delle garanzie con le controparti, risolvere le discrepanze in modo tempestivo - Collaborare con le controparti, i broker di compensazione e i custodi per garantire movimenti e regolamenti delle garanzie senza intoppi ## Il profilo tuo - +5 anni di esperienza in gestione patrimoniale/ operazioni o attività FX - Diploma universitario in contabilità, finanza e/o gestione aziendale

descriptionByLocale.de: Missione Der Middle Officer im Asset Management fungiert als zentrale Anlaufstelle für operative Fragen und sorgt für zeitnahe Kundenantworten und eine reibungslose Transaktionsabwicklung. Zu den Hauptaufgaben gehören der Handelsabgleich, die Nachverfolgung der Abwicklung, die täglichen Abstimmungen, das Sicherheitenmanagement und die Problemlösung. Die Rolle umfasst auch die Erstellung von Tätigkeitsberichten, die Zusammenarbeit mit Gegenparteien und die Implementierung neuer Prozesse zur Verbesserung der betrieblichen Effizienz. ## Mansioni principali - Handeln Sie als zentraler Ansprechpartner für operative Fragen und stehen Sie unseren Kunden jederzeit zeitnah zur Verfügung - Wertpapier- und Devisenhandelsabgleich, Anweisung an relevante Dritte und Nachverfolgung der Abwicklung - OTC- und ETD-Handelsabgleich und Clearing-Überwachung - Erstellen Sie die täglichen Tätigkeitsberichte an Dritte - Führen Sie tägliche Abgleiche von Portfolio-Positionen, Kassenbeständen und Transaktionen durch - Pannenanalyse, Untersuchung bis zur Auflösung - Teilnahme an der Implementierung neuer Prozesse und Kontrollen - Überwachen Sie die tägliche Verwaltung von Sicherheiten für Derivate - Führen Sie tägliche Abgleiche von Sicherheitenbeständen mit Gegenparteien durch, beheben Sie Diskrepanzen rechtzeitig - Arbeiten Sie mit Gegenparteien, Clearing-Brokern und Verwahrstellen zusammen, um reibungslose Sicherheitenbewegungen und -abwicklungen zu gewährleisten ## Il tuo profilo - +5 Jahre Erfahrung im Asset Management / Betrieb oder Devisenaktivitäten - Hochschulabschluss(e) in Buchhaltung, Finanzen und/oder Geschäftsmanagement
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission L'agent intermédiaire de la gestion des biens est le point de contact central pour les demandes de renseignements opérationnels, assurant la rapidité des réponses des clients et le traitement des transactions. jobs.title: Investment Advisor
jobs.description:
Mission 
 The Investment Advisor is responsible for delivering tailored investment advice and portfolio strategies to high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth individuals. Working closely with Relationship Managers (RMs), the IA ensures client receive comprehensive, risk-appropriate investment solutions aligned with their goals, profile, and the Bank’s values.
 
 Main responsibilities 
 Provide customized investment advice based on client objectives, risk appetite and market conditions
 Construct and optimize investment portfolios using a broad range of asset classes
 Present investment strategies clearly and transparently, including expected returns, risks and associated costs
 Conduct regular portfolio reviews and rebalancing recommendations
 Act as the trusted investment contact for existing clients, in partnership with RMs
 Support in deepening client relationships and enhancing retention through proactive investment insight and performance monitoring
 Assist in client meetings, prepare proposals and contribute to the acquisition and onboarding of new clients as well as for business retention
 Stay abreast of macroeconomic trends, financial markets and geopolitical developments
 Work closely with internal teams to align with the Bank’s investment strategy and core values
 Promote and explain investment products to RMs and relevant target advisory client groups
 Ensure full compliance with Swiss regulatory frameworks
 

 Your Profile 
 University degree in Finance, economics or related field, or a qualification considered equivalent 
 CFA, CIIA, CWMA or similar certification is a strong asset 
 Strong knowledge of investment products and ability to execute trades for equities, derivatives, fixed income, bonds, warrants and mutual funds 
 Min 5 years of experience in a similar position in Private Banking or a Financial Institution 
 Strong communication and interpersonal skills, client focus, reliability, flexibility and stress resistant 
 Good command of MS Office suite, portfolio analysis tools and banking software 
 Perfectly fluent in French and English. Very good knowledge of Russian and any additional language skill would be an added value. 
 Adaptability to work in an agile organization 
 
 Others 
 Swiss Residence 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Il Consulente per gli Investimenti è responsabile per la fornitura di consulenza di investimento su misura e strategie di portafoglio per gli individui ad alto valore di rete e ultra-high-net-worth. Lavorando a stretto contatto con Relationship Managers (RM), l'IA assicura al cliente di ricevere soluzioni di investimento complete e appropriate al rischio allineate con i loro obiettivi, profilo e valori della Banca. ## Principali responsabilitÃ - Fornire consulenza d'investimento personalizzata in base agli obiettivi del cliente, all'appetito del rischio e alle condizioni di mercato - Costruisci e ottimizza i portafogli di investimento utilizzando una vasta gamma di classi di asset - Presenti strategie di investimento chiaramente e trasparente, compresi i ritorni attesi, i rischi e i costi associati - Condurre regolari recensioni di portafoglio e raccomandazioni di riequilibrio - Atto come il contatto di investimento fidato per i clienti esistenti, in collaborazione con RM - Sostegni finanziari Molto buona conoscenza del russo e qualsiasi abilità linguistica aggiuntiva sarebbe un valore aggiunto. - Adaptability to work in an agile organizzazione ## Others - Swiss Residence ## Core Competencies - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsibility - Conformità alle normative e direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Der Investment Advisor ist verantwortlich für die Bereitstellung von maßgeschneiderten Investitionsberatungs- und Portfoliostrategien für hochvernetzte und ultrahochvernetzte Personen. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit Relationship Managers (RMs) sorgt die IA dafür, dass Kunden umfassende, risikogerechte Anlagelösungen erhalten, die mit ihren Zielen, Profilen und den Werten der Bank übereinstimmen. CFK-Beratung - Konstruieren und optimieren Sie Investment-Portfolio mit einer breiten Palette von Asset-Klassen - Präsentieren Sie Anlagestrategien klar und transparent, einschließlich erwartete Renditen, Risiken und damit verbundene Kosten - Führen Sie regelmäßige Portfolio-Bewertungen und Retentionsempfehlungen - Aktivieren Sie als vertrauenswürdiger Anlagekontakt für bestehende Kunden, in Partnerschaft mit RMs Sehr gute Kenntnisse über Russisch und jede zusätzliche Sprachfertigkeit wäre ein Mehrwert. - Anpassungsfähigkeit an die Arbeit in einer agilen Organisation - Swiss Residence / Core Competencies - Adherence to the company’s Values: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Le conseiller en investissement est chargé de fournir des conseils sur mesure en matière d'investissement et des stratégies de portefeuille aux personnes à valeur élevée et à valeur élevée. En travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les gestionnaires de relations (GR), l'IV s'assure que le client reçoit des solutions d'investissement complètes et adaptées au risque, alignées sur ses objectifs, son profil et les valeurs de la Banque. ## Principales responsabilités - Fournir des conseils personnalisés en matière d'investissement en fonction des objectifs du client, de l'appétit pour les risques et des conditions du marché - Créer et optimiser des portefeuilles d'investissement en utilisant un large éventail de catégories d'actifs - Présenter des stratégies d'investissement de façon claire et transparente, y compris les rendements attendus, les risques et les coûts connexes - Effectuer des examens réguliers du portefeuille et des recommandations de rééquilibrage - Agir en tant que contact de confiance en matière d'investissement pour les clients existants, en partenariat avec les RM - Soutenir l'approfondissement des relations avec les clients et le renforcement de la rétention grâce à une analyse proactive des investissements et au suivi des performances - Aider les clients à se réunir, à préparer des propositions et à contribuer à l'acquisition et à l'embarquement de nouveaux clients ainsi qu'à la rétention des entreprises - Restez au fait des tendances macroéconomiques, des marchés financiers et des développements géopolitiques - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes internes pour s'aligner sur la stratégie d'investissement et les valeurs de base de la Banque - Promouvoir et expliquer les produits d'investissement aux RM et aux groupes clients cibles pertinents - Assurer la pleine conformité aux cadres réglementaires suisses ## Une très bonne connaissance du russe et de toute autre compétence linguistique serait une valeur ajoutée. - Aptitude au travail dans une organisation agile ## Autres - Résidence suisse ## Compétences de base - Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise: Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes

jobs.title: Tax Specialist
jobs.description:
Mission 
 
 We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Tax Specialist to join our Client Documentation and Tax Services Department. 
 As part of the Fiscal Reporting team, you will play a key role in ensuring the accuracy and quality of our clients’ tax statements, while collaborating with various departments and external providers. 
 This is a unique opportunity to grow in a fast-paced, stimulating environment and contribute to impactful projects across the bank. 
 
 Main Responsibilities 
 
 Tax Statement Review & Validation 
- Review and validate tax statements for over 20 international jurisdictions, including Switzerland, France, Portugal, Mexico, and others.
- Ensure that tax documents comply with local and international regulations before being sent to clients.
 Data Quality Assurance 
- Collaborate with our external provider to ensure the quality and accuracy of tax data before statement production.
- Identify and correct anomalies or inconsistencies in the data to ensure reliable reporting.
 Client Support & Front Office Interaction 
- Address inquiries and requests from the Front Office regarding tax statements, providing clear and precise explanations.
- Manage tax document orders in coordination with internal teams and external providers.
 Cross-Functional Collaboration 
- Work closely with Compliance, Operations, Front Office, and IT teams to ensure smooth management of tax processes.
- Actively participate in cross-functional projects involving process improvements, regulatory updates, or strategic initiatives.
 Project Management 
- Contribute to side projects related to tax data, information systems, and operational processes.
- Participate in the continuous improvement of tools and processes in collaboration with IT and other departments.
 Regulatory Compliance & Reporting 
- Stay updated on tax regulatory changes across the covered jurisdictions.
- Prepare detailed reports and maintain comprehensive documentation to meet audit and regulatory requirements.
 
 Key Skills & Qualifications 
 • Tax Expertise : In-depth knowledge of international tax regulations.
• Analytical Skills : Ability to analyze complex data and identify anomalies.
• Client Orientation : Excellent communication skills to address Front Office and client inquiries.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Experience working with multidisciplinary teams (Compliance, IT, Operations, etc.).
• Project Management : Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines.
 
 What We're Looking For 
 • Experience : Minimum 2 years in banking, with a focus on tax services.
• Skills : Strong knowledge of financial instruments (Equities, Bonds, Structured Products, Derivatives – Listed or OTC) and their specific characteristics. Familiarity with European income and gains taxation is a plus. Proficiency in Microsoft Office is essential.
• Languages : Fluency in French and English is required; German, Italian, Spanish, or Portuguese is a plus.
• Mindset : Proactive, solution-oriented, and eager to learn. Strong problem-solving skills, ability to work quickly and efficiently, and a team player who thrives in a fast-paced environment.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 • Be part of a collaborative and innovative team.
• Work in a challenging yet rewarding environment.
• Develop your expertise and grow your career in a leading financial institution.
 
 If you’re ready to take on this exciting challenge and make a long-term impact, we’d love to hear from you!

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Siamo alla ricerca di uno specialista fiscale motivato e orientato al dettaglio per aderire al nostro Servizio Clienti Documentazione e Servizi fiscali. Nell’ambito del team Fiscal Reporting, si svolgerà un ruolo chiave nel garantire l’accuratezza e la qualità delle dichiarazioni fiscali dei nostri clienti, collaborando con vari dipartimenti e fornitori esterni. Si tratta di un'occasione unica per crescere in un ambiente veloce e stimolante e contribuire a progetti di impatto in tutta la banca. ## Mansioni ### Tax Statement Review & Validation - Revisione e convalida delle dichiarazioni fiscali per oltre 20 giurisdizioni internazionali, tra cui Svizzera, Francia, Portogallo, Messico e altri. - Assicurarsi che i documenti fiscali siano conformi alle normative locali e internazionali prima di essere inviati ai clienti. ### Data Quality Assurance - Collabora con il nostro fornitore esterno per garantire la qualità e l'accuratezza dei dati fiscali prima della produzione delle dichiarazioni. - Identificare e correggere anomalie o incongruenze dei dati per garantire un report affidabile. ### Customer Support & Front Office Interaction - Inchieste di indirizzo e richieste del Front Office relative alle dichiarazioni fiscali, fornendo spiegazioni chiare e precise. - Gestire gli ordini dei documenti fiscali in coordinamento con le squadre interne e i fornitori esterni. #### Cross-Functional Collaboration - Lavorare a stretto contatto con i team Compliance, Operations, Front Office e IT per garantire una gestione regolare dei processi fiscali. - Partecipa attivamente a progetti interfunzionali che coinvolgono miglioramenti di processo, aggiornamenti normativi o iniziative strategiche. ### Project Management - Contribuisci ai progetti collaterali relativi ai dati fiscali, ai sistemi informativi e ai processi operativi. - Partecipa al miglioramento continuo di strumenti e processi in collaborazione con IT e altri reparti. ### No Regulatory Compliance & Reporting - Resta aggiornato sulle modifiche normative fiscali nelle giurisdizioni coperte. - Preparare report dettagliati e mantenere una documentazione completa per soddisfare i requisiti di audit e regolamentazione. ## Competenze e Qualifiche - Tax Expertise: Conoscenza approfondita delle normative fiscali internazionali. - Competenze analitiche: Capacità di analizzare dati complessi e identificare anomalie. - Orientamento del cliente: eccellenti capacità di comunicazione per affrontare le richieste del cliente e dell'ufficio anteriore. - Collaborazione trasversale: esperienza di lavoro con team multidisciplinari (Compliance, IT, Operazioni, ecc.). - Project Management: Capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente e rispettare le scadenze. ## Cosa Cerchiamo - Esperienza: Minimo 2 anni nel settore bancario, con un focus sui servizi fiscali. - Competenze: Forte conoscenza degli strumenti finanziari (Equità, Obbligazioni, Prodotti Strutturati, Derivati – Elencati o OTC) e delle loro caratteristiche specifiche. La familiarità con il reddito europeo e i guadagni fiscali è un plus. La competenza in Microsoft Office è essenziale. - Lingue: E' richiesta la fluenza in francese e inglese; tedesco, italiano, spagnolo o portoghese è un plus. - Mindset: Proattivo, orientato alla soluzione, e desideroso di imparare. Forte capacità di problem solving, capacità di lavorare in modo rapido ed efficiente, e un giocatore di squadra che prospera in un ambiente frenetico. # Cosa# Offerta - Fa parte di un team collaborativo e innovativo. - Lavorare in un ambiente stimolante ma gratificante. - Sviluppare la tua esperienza e crescere la tua carriera in un istituto finanziario leader. Se siete pronti a affrontare questa sfida emozionante e fare un impatto a lungo termine, ci piacerebbe sentire da voi!

Data Quality Assurance - Collaborate with our external provider to ensure the quality and accuracy of tax data before statement production. - Identify and correct anomalies or inconsistencies in the data to ensure reliable reporting. Client Support & Front Office Interaction - Address inquiries and requests from the Front Office regarding tax statements, providing clear and precise explanations. - Manage tax document orders in coordination with internal teams and external providers. Cross-Functional Collaboration - Work closely with Compliance, Operations, Front Office, and IT teams to ensure smooth management of tax processes. - Actively participate in cross-functional projects involving process improvements, regulatory updates, or strategic initiatives. Project Management - Contribute to side projects related to tax data, information systems, and operational processes. - Participate in the continuous improvement of tools and processes in collaboration with IT and other departments. Regulatory Compliance & Reporting - Stay updated on tax regulatory changes across the covered jurisdictions. - Prepare detailed reports and maintain comprehensive documentation to meet audit and regulatory requirements. Key Skills & Qualifications • Tax Expertise : In-depth knowledge of international tax regulations. • Analytical Skills : Ability to analyze complex data and identify anomalies. • Client Orientation : Excellent communication skills to address Front Office and client inquiries. • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Experience working with multidisciplinary teams (Compliance, IT, Operations, etc.). • Project Management : Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines. What We're Looking For • Experience : Minimum 2 years in banking, with a focus on tax services. • Skills : Strong knowledge of financial instruments (Equities, Bonds, Structured Products, Derivatives – Listed or OTC) and their specific characteristics. Familiarity with European income and gains taxation is a plus. Proficiency in Microsoft Office is essential. • Languages : Fluency in French and English is required; German, Italian, Spanish, or Portuguese is a plus. • Mindset : Proactive, solution-oriented, and eager to learn. Strong problem-solving skills, ability to work quickly and efficiently, and a team player who thrives in a fast-paced environment. Why Join Us? • Be part of a collaborative and innovative team. • Work in a challenging yet rewarding environment. • Develop your expertise and grow your career in a leading financial institution. If you’re ready to take on this exciting challenge and make a long-term impact, we’d love to hear from you!
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Wir suchen einen motivierten und detailorientierten Steuerspezialisten, der sich unserer Kundendokumentation und Steuerserviceabteilung anschließt. Im Rahmen des Fiscal Reporting Teams spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Sicherstellung der Genauigkeit und Qualität der Steuererklärungen unserer Kunden, während Sie mit verschiedenen Abteilungen und externen Anbietern zusammenarbeiten. Dies ist eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, in einer schnelllebigen, anregenden Umgebung zu wachsen und zu schlagkräftigen Projekten in der gesamten Bank beizutragen. Â Mansioni ### Tax Statement Review & Validation - Bewertung und Validierung von Steuererklärungen für über 20 internationale Gerichtsbarkeiten, darunter Schweiz, Frankreich, Portugal, Mexiko und andere. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Steuerdokumente den lokalen und internationalen Vorschriften entsprechen, bevor Sie an Kunden gesendet werden. ### Data Quality Assurance - Mit unserem externen Anbieter zusammenarbeiten, um die Qualität und Genauigkeit von Steuerdaten vor der Statement-Produktion zu gewährleisten. - Identifizierung und Korrektur von Anomalien oder Unstimmigkeiten in den Daten, um eine zuverlässige Berichterstattung zu gewährleisten. ### Client Support & Front Office Interaction - Adressenanfragen und Anfragen vom Front Office in Bezug auf Steuererklärungen, Bereitstellung klarer und präziser Erklärungen. - Steuerbelegaufträge in Abstimmung mit internen Teams und externen Anbietern verwalten. ### Cross-Functional Collaboration - Arbeiten Sie eng mit Compliance-, Operations-, Front Office- und IT-Teams zusammen, um eine reibungslose Verwaltung der Steuerprozesse sicherzustellen. - Nehmen Sie aktiv an funktionsübergreifenden Projekten mit Prozessverbesserungen, regulatorischen Updates oder strategischen Initiativen teil. ### Project Management - Mit Nebenprojekten im Zusammenhang mit Steuerdaten, Informationssystemen und operativen Prozessen. - Erwarten Sie die kontinuierliche Verbesserung von Werkzeugen und Prozessen in Zusammenarbeit mit IT und anderen Abteilungen. ### Regulatory Compliance & Reporting - Bleiben Sie auf den steuerrechtlichen Änderungen in den abgedeckten Zuständigkeiten aktualisiert. - Bereiten Sie detaillierte Berichte vor und pflegen Sie umfassende Dokumentationen, um die Prüfungs- und Regulierungsanforderungen zu erfüllen. Â Competenze e Qualifiche - Tax Expertise: Vertiefte Kenntnis der internationalen Steuervorschriften. - Analytische Fähigkeiten: Fähigkeit, komplexe Daten zu analysieren und Anomalien zu identifizieren. - Kundenorientierung: Ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, um Front Office und Kundenanfragen anzusprechen. - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Erfahrungsarbeit mit multidisziplinären Teams (Compliance, IT, Operations, etc.). - Projektmanagement: Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu verwalten und Termine zu erfüllen. Cosa Cerchiamo - Erfahrung: Mindestens 2 Jahre im Bankwesen, mit einem Fokus auf Steuerdienstleistungen. - Fähigkeiten: Starkes Wissen über Finanzinstrumente (Equities, Bonds, Structured Products, Derivate – Listed or OTC) und deren spezifische Eigenschaften. Die Vertraulichkeit mit dem europäischen Einkommen und der Gewinnbesteuerung ist ein Plus. Die Effizienz in Microsoft Office ist unerlässlich. - Sprachen: Fluency in Französisch und Englisch ist erforderlich; Deutsch, Italienisch, Spanisch oder Portugiesisch ist ein Plus. - Mindset: Proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und lernbereit. Starke Problemlösungsfähigkeiten, schnelles und effizientes Arbeiten und ein Teamplayer, der in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung lebt. Â Cosa Offriamo - Sei Teil eines kollaborativen und innovativen Teams. - Arbeiten Sie in einer anspruchsvollen und dennoch lohnenden Umgebung. - Entwickeln Sie Ihr Know-how und wachsen Sie Ihre Karriere in einer führenden Finanzinstitution. Wenn Sie bereit sind, diese spannende Herausforderung anzugehen und eine langfristige Wirkung zu erzielen, würden wir gerne von Ihnen hören!
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missione Nous sommes à la recherche d'un spécialiste de la fiscalité motivé et axé sur les détails pour nous joindre à notre service de documentation et de services fiscaux. Dans le cadre de l'équipe de rapports financiers, vous jouerez un rôle clé pour assurer l'exactitude et la qualité de nos états fiscaux, tout en collaborant avec divers ministères et fournisseurs externes. C'est une occasion unique de se développer dans un environnement stimulant et rapide et de contribuer à des projets d'impact à travers la banque. ## Mansioni ### Examen et validation des déclarations fiscales - Examiner et valider les déclarations fiscales pour plus de 20 juridictions internationales, dont la Suisse, la France, le Portugal, le Mexique et d'autres. - Veiller à ce que les documents fiscaux soient conformes aux règlements locaux et internationaux avant d'être envoyés aux clients. ### Assurance de la qualité des données - Collaborer avec notre fournisseur externe pour assurer la qualité et l'exactitude des données fiscales avant la production des déclarations. - Identifier et corriger les anomalies ou les incohérences dans les données afin d'assurer la fiabilité des rapports. ### Soutien à la clientèle et interaction avec le bureau central - Adresser les demandes et les demandes du bureau central concernant les déclarations de revenus, en fournissant des explications claires et précises. - Gérer les commandes de documents fiscaux en coordination avec les équipes internes et les fournisseurs externes. ### Collaboration interfonctionnelle - Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes de conformité, d'exploitation, de front office et de TI pour assurer une gestion harmonieuse des processus fiscaux. - Participer activement à des projets interfonctionnels comportant des améliorations des processus, des mises à jour réglementaires ou des initiatives stratégiques. ### Gestion de projet - Contribuer aux projets parallèles liés aux données fiscales, aux systèmes d'information et aux processus opérationnels. - Participer à l'amélioration continue des outils et des processus en collaboration avec la TI et d'autres ministères. ### Conformité à la réglementation et rapports - Restez au courant des changements apportés à la réglementation fiscale dans les administrations visées. - Préparer des rapports détaillés et tenir à jour une documentation complète pour répondre aux exigences de la vérification et de la réglementation. ## Competenze e Qualifiche - Expertise en fiscalité : Connaissance approfondie de la réglementation fiscale internationale. - Compétences analytiques : Capacité d'analyser des données complexes et d'identifier des anomalies. - Orientation des clients : Excellentes compétences en communication pour répondre aux demandes de renseignements des clients. - Collaboration interfonctionnelle : Expérience de travail avec des équipes multidisciplinaires (Compliance, TI, Opérations, etc.). - Gestion de projets : Capacité de gérer plusieurs projets simultanément et respecter les délais. ## Cosa Cerchiamo - Expérience: Minimum 2 ans en banque, avec un accent sur les services fiscaux. - Compétences : Forte connaissance des instruments financiers (actions, obligations, produits structurés, dérivés – cotés ou OTC) et de leurs caractéristiques spécifiques. La connaissance du revenu et des gains en Europe est un plus. La compétence dans Microsoft Office est essentielle. - Langues: L'allemand, l'italien, l'espagnol ou le portugais est un plus. - Mindset: Proactive, orientée vers la solution et impatiente d'apprendre. Fortes compétences de résolution de problèmes, la capacité de travailler rapidement et efficacement, et un joueur d'équipe qui prospère dans un environnement rapide. ## Cosa Offriamo - Faites partie d'une équipe collaborative et innovante. - Travailler dans un environnement stimulant mais gratifiant. - Développez votre expertise et développez votre carrière dans une institution financière de premier plan. Si vous êtes prêt à relever ce défi passionnant et à faire un impact à long terme, nous aimerions vous entendre !

jobs.title: Investment Marketing Content Manager (Temporary 12 months)

titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de contenu marketing d'investissement (temporaire 12 mois)

jobs.description:
Mission 
 Within Investment Management, you play a key role in the conception, structuring and strategic presentation of investment content across all asset classes.
At the intersection of portfolio management, strategy and other business lines, you transform complex financial expertise into clear, structured and visually compelling materials.
You ensure that investment communication is rigorous, compliant with regulatory requirements, and fully aligned with the identity and standards of an international investment group.
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 Strategic Structuring of Investment Content 
 Work closely with Investment Management stakeholders to formalise and structure investment views.
Translate complex financial analysis into clear, pedagogical and strategically coherent narratives.
Ensure consistency between investment philosophy, portfolio construction and client communication.
Contribute to the articulation of multi asset strategies and portfolio architecture frameworks.
 Editorial Leadership & Financial Design 
 Lead the editorial and visual development of investment materials, including strategic presentations, outlook publications, fund documentation and digital content.
Maintain high visual and editorial standards in line with private banking expectations.
Structure financial storytelling through clear message hierarchy and rigorous visual architecture.
Ensure coherence across asset classes and publications.
 Digital Integration 
 Oversee content production using Adobe InDesign and coordinate adaptation for digital investment platforms.
Actively contribute to the investment content distribution strategy.
Support the enhancement of client and user experience across digital channels.
 Governance & Coordination 
 Support the Investment Project Manager in coordinating cross functional initiatives within Investment Management.
Work closely with Compliance to ensure regulatory soundness of all materials.
Contribute to the continuous improvement of production, validation and deployment processes.
Participate in the definition and harmonisation of editorial and visual standards at group level.
 
 Profile 
 Experience 
 Proven experience within private banking, asset management or investment banking.
Solid understanding of financial markets and major asset classes.
Demonstrated ability to structure and formalise complex investment content.
Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign. Knowledge of Illustrator and Photoshop is an advantage.
Experience operating in a regulated financial environment.
Strong interest in the digital evolution of investment communication.
 Key Skills 
 Investment architecture communication
Investment narrative structuring
Editorial design applied to finance
Cross functional coordination with investment teams
Digital investment content integration
Strong institutional and premium standards awareness
 Education 
 Higher education in finance, economics or a related field.
A dual background in finance and communication or design is considered a strong advantage.
 Languages 
 French: fluent or native
English: fluent, written and spoken
Additional languages are an advantage
 Technical Skills 
 Strong understanding of regulated financial communication requirements
Experience adapting investment materials for digital platforms
Understanding of multi asset reporting frameworks
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione - All'interno della gestione degli investimenti, si gioca un ruolo chiave nella concezione, strutturazione e presentazione strategica dei contenuti di investimento in tutte le classi di asset. - No. All'incrocio tra gestione del portafoglio, strategia e altre linee di business, si trasformano competenze finanziarie complesse in materiali chiari, strutturati e visivamente convincenti. - No. Assicurarsi che la comunicazione degli investimenti sia rigorosa, conforme ai requisiti normativi, e pienamente allineato con l'identità e gli standard di un gruppo di investimento internazionale. ## Responsabilità chiave ## #Struttura strategica dei contenuti degli investimenti - Lavorare a stretto contatto con gli stakeholder della gestione degli investimenti per formalizzare e strutturare le opinioni sugli investimenti. - Tradurre analisi finanziarie complesse in narrazioni chiare, pedagogiche e strategicamente coerenti. - Assicurare la coerenza tra filosofia di investimento, costruzione di portafoglio e comunicazione cliente. - Contribuire all'articolazione di strategie multi asset e framework di architettura portafoglio. #### Editorial Leadership & Financial Design - Guida lo sviluppo editoriale e visivo dei materiali di investimento, incluse presentazioni strategiche, pubblicazioni di prospettiva, documentazione di fondo e contenuti digitali. - Mantenere elevati standard visivi e editoriali in linea con le aspettative bancarie private. - Strutturare lo storytelling finanziario attraverso una chiara gerarchia dei messaggi e una rigorosa architettura visiva. - Assicurare coerenza tra classi di attività e pubblicazioni. ### Digital Integration - Superare la produzione di contenuti utilizzando Adobe InDesign e coordinare l'adattamento per le piattaforme di investimento digitali. - Contribuire attivamente alla strategia di distribuzione dei contenuti di investimento. - Supporta la valorizzazione dell'esperienza del cliente e dell'utente attraverso i canali digitali. #### Governance & Coordination - Sostenere il responsabile del progetto di investimento nel coordinare le iniziative funzionali cross all'interno della gestione degli investimenti. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con Compliance per garantire la solidità normativa di tutti i materiali. - Contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei processi di produzione, convalida e distribuzione. - Partecipare alla definizione e all'armonizzazione degli standard editoriali e visivi a livello di gruppo. ## Profilo ## Esperienza - Esperienza comprovata all'interno di private banking, asset management o investment banking. - Solida comprensione dei mercati finanziari e delle principali classi di asset. - Capacità dimostrata di strutturare e formalizzare contenuti di investimento complessi. - Competenza avanzata in Adobe InDesign. La conoscenza di Illustrator e Photoshop è un vantaggio. - Esperienza operativa in un ambiente finanziario regolamentato. - Forte interesse per l'evoluzione digitale della comunicazione degli investimenti. ### Key Skills - Comunicazione di architettura degli investimenti - Strutturazione narrativa degli investimenti - Progettazione editoriale applicata alla finanza - Coordinamento funzionale trasversale con i team di investimento - Integrazione dei contenuti di investimento digitale - Forte consapevolezza degli standard istituzionali e premium ## Education - Istruzione superiore in finanza, economia o un campo relativo. - Un doppio background in finanza e comunicazione o design è considerato un forte vantaggio. ### Lingue - Francese: fluente o nativo - Inglese: fluente, scritto e parlato - Le lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio ## competenze tecniche - Forte comprensione dei requisiti di comunicazione finanziaria regolamentati - Esperienza di adattamento dei materiali di investimento per piattaforme digitali - Comprensione dei framework di reporting multi asset ## Competenza core - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsibility - Conformance con le direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission - Innerhalb des Investment Managements spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Konzeption, Strukturierung und strategischen Präsentation von Anlageinhalten in allen Assetklassen. - Ja. An der Schnittstelle von Portfoliomanagement, Strategie und anderen Geschäftsfeldern transformieren Sie komplexe finanzielle Expertise in klare, strukturierte und visuell überzeugende Materialien. - Ja. Sie stellen sicher, dass die Investitionskommunikation streng ist, den regulatorischen Anforderungen entspricht und die Identität und die Standards einer internationalen Investmentgruppe vollständig angepasst sind. ### Strategische Strukturierung von Investitionsinhalten - Arbeiten Sie eng mit den Interessenvertretern des Investment Managements zusammen, um Investment-Ansichten zu formalisieren und zu strukturieren. - Übersetzen Sie komplexe Finanzanalysen in klare, pädagogische und strategisch kohärente Erzählungen. - Gewährleistung der Konsistenz zwischen Investitionsphilosophie, Portfolio-Bau und Kundenkommunikation. - Beitrag zur Artikulation von Multi Asset-Strategien und Portfolio-Architektur-Rahmen. ### Editorial Leadership & Financial Design - Führen Sie die redaktionelle und visuelle Entwicklung von Investitionsmaterialien, einschließlich strategischer Präsentationen, Ausblickveröffentlichungen, Fondsdokumentation und digitaler Inhalte. - Bewahren Sie hohe visuelle und redaktionelle Standards im Einklang mit den Erwartungen der Privatbanken. - Struktur finanzielles Storytelling durch klare Botschaft Hierarchie und strenge visuelle Architektur. - Gewährleistung der Kohärenz in allen Assetklassen und Publikationen. ### Digitale Integration - Übersehen Sie die Content-Produktion mit Adobe InDesign und Koordinatenanpassung für digitale Investmentplattformen. - Aktiver Beitrag zur Strategie der Investment Content Distribution. - Unterstützung der Verbesserung der Kunden- und Nutzererfahrung über digitale Kanäle. ### Governance & Coordination - Unterstützung des Investment Project Managers bei der Koordination von funktionsübergreifenden Initiativen im Investment Management. - Arbeiten Sie eng mit Compliance zusammen, um die regulatorische Klangfähigkeit aller Materialien zu gewährleisten. - Beitrag zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung der Produktions-, Validierungs- und Bereitstellungsprozesse. - Erwarten Sie die Definition und Harmonisierung der redaktionellen und visuellen Standards auf Gruppenebene. Â Profil ### Erfahrung - Bewährte Erfahrung im Private Banking, Asset Management oder Investment Banking. - Solides Verständnis der Finanzmärkte und der wichtigsten Vermögensklassen. - Demonstrierte Fähigkeit, komplexe Anlageinhalte zu strukturieren und zu formalisieren. - Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse in Adobe InDesign. Das Wissen von Illustrator und Photoshop ist ein Vorteil. - Erfahrung in einem geregelten Finanzumfeld. - Starkes Interesse an der digitalen Entwicklung der Investitionskommunikation. ### Key Skills - Investment-Architektur-Kommunikation - Investment narrative Strukturierung - Editorial Design angewendet, um zu finanzieren - Cross-funktionelle Koordination mit Investment-Teams - Digitale Investment-Inhalte-Integration - Starke institutionellen und Premium-Standards Bewusstsein ### Bildung - Höhere Bildung in Finanzen, Wirtschaft oder ein verwandten Bereich. - Ein doppelter Hintergrund in Finanzen und Kommunikation oder Design gilt als ein starker Vorteil. ### Sprachen - Französisch: fließend oder native - Englisch: fließend, schriftlich und gesprochen - Zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Vorteil ### Technische Fähigkeiten - Starkes Verständnis der regulierten Finanzkommunikationsanforderungen - Erleben Sie die Anpassung von Anlagematerialien für digitale Plattformen - Verständnis von Multi Asset Reporting Frameworks
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission - Au sein de la gestion des investissements, vous jouez un rôle clé dans la conception, la structuration et la présentation stratégique du contenu des investissements dans toutes les classes d'actifs. - Oui. À l'intersection de la gestion de portefeuille, de la stratégie et d'autres secteurs d'activité, vous transformez une expertise financière complexe en documents clairs, structurés et visuellement convaincants. - Oui. Vous veillez à ce que la communication des investissements soit rigoureuse, conforme aux exigences réglementaires et pleinement conforme à l'identité et aux normes d'un groupe d'investissement international. ## Principales responsabilités ### Structure stratégique du contenu des investissements - Collaborer étroitement avec les intervenants de la gestion des investissements pour formaliser et structurer les points de vue sur les investissements. - Traduire l'analyse financière complexe en récits clairs, pédagogiques et stratégiquement cohérents. - Assurer la cohérence entre la philosophie d'investissement, la construction de portefeuilles et la communication avec les clients. - Contribuer à l'élaboration de stratégies multiactifs et de cadres d'architecture de portefeuille. ### Leadership éditorial et conception financière - Diriger le développement éditorial et visuel du matériel d'investissement, y compris les présentations stratégiques, les publications de perspectives, la documentation de fonds et le contenu numérique. - Maintenir des normes visuelles et éditoriales élevées en fonction des attentes des banques privées. - Structurer l'histoire financière par une hiérarchie claire des messages et une architecture visuelle rigoureuse. - Assurer la cohérence entre les classes de biens et les publications. ### Intégration numérique - Surveiller la production de contenu en utilisant Adobe InDesign et coordonner l'adaptation pour les plateformes d'investissement numériques. - Contribuer activement à la stratégie de distribution des contenus d'investissement. - Soutenir l'amélioration de l'expérience client et utilisateur à travers les canaux numériques. ### Gouvernance et coordination - Aider le gestionnaire de projet d'investissement à coordonner les initiatives interfonctionnelles au sein de la gestion des investissements. - Collaborer étroitement avec la conformité pour assurer la solidité réglementaire de tous les matériaux. - Contribuer à l'amélioration continue des processus de production, de validation et de déploiement. - Participer à la définition et à l'harmonisation des normes éditoriales et visuelles au niveau du groupe. ## Profil ### Expérience - Expérience éprouvée au sein des banques privées, de la gestion d'actifs ou des banques d'investissement. - Une bonne compréhension des marchés financiers et des grandes classes d'actifs. - Capacité démontrée de structurer et de formaliser des contenus d'investissement complexes. - Compétence avancée en Adobe InDesign. La connaissance de l'illustrateur et de Photoshop est un avantage. - Expérience dans un environnement financier réglementé. - Un fort intérêt pour l'évolution numérique de la communication d'investissement. ### Compétences clés - Architecture de l'investissement communication - Structure narrative de l'investissement - Conception éditoriale appliquée au financement - Coordination interfonctionnelle avec les équipes d'investissement - Intégration du contenu de l'investissement numérique - Forte sensibilisation aux normes institutionnelles et haut de gamme ### Éducation - Enseignement supérieur en finance, en économie ou dans un domaine connexe. - Une double expérience en finance et communication ou conception est considérée comme un avantage important. ### Langues - Français : couramment ou natif - Anglais : couramment, écrit et parlé - D'autres langues sont un avantage ### Compétences techniques - Forte compréhension des exigences réglementaires en matière de communication financière - Expérience d'adaptation du matériel d'investissement pour les plateformes numériques - Compréhension des cadres de rapports multiactifs ## Compétences de base - Respect des valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes
