descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Based in unserem Hauptbüro in Genf, Sie werden dem Global Service Desk Team beitreten und rund 3.000 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) Kollegen weltweit unterstützen. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Antwort auf die Global Service Desk Telefonleitung für alle UBP-Nutzer weltweit. Verwalten Sie E-Mails an Global Service Desk. Verwalten Sie Workload von unserem selbstfahrenden Werkzeug. Bereitstellung von Remote-Hilfe für Benutzer und versuchen, das Problem auf dem ersten Anruf zu lösen. Erstellen Sie Vorkommnisse mit klaren und expliziten Informationen und weisen Sie gegebenenfalls Level 2 Teams zu. Aktualisierung der Wissensdokumentation und -verfahren. Arbeitszeit: Wochentage, Schichtabdeckung von 07:30 bis 19:00 Uhr. Ihr Profil Help Desk Institute Certification (CFC) oder gleichwertig. Eine erste erfolgreiche Erfahrung in einem Help Desk Service ist obligatorisch. Microsoft Operating System Certification(s) wird ein Asset sein. Die Zertifizierung der ITIL Foundation wird ein Vorteil sein. Expertise in Microsoft Windows 11 und Microsoft 365 (Office 365) Erfahrung mit Citrix und VDI-Umgebungen und mit Remote Access-Verbindung (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace). Kenntnisse von, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Networking. Wissen über Mobilität: iOS und iPhone, iPad. JIRA Service Management Werkzeug Wissen. Flöten in Französisch und Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen betrachteten einen Vermögenswert. Kompetenzen Ausgezeichnetes analytisches Denken und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten. Ausgezeichnete mündliche und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Sehr kundenorientierter Service. Prioritätseinstellung, Multitask-Fähigkeit. Teamplayer bereit, Besitz zu nehmen. Fähigkeit, in einer sich schnell verändernden Umgebung zu arbeiten. Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Basée dans notre bureau principal à Genève, vous rejoindrez l'équipe Global Service Desk, fournissant un soutien de première ligne à environ 3 000 collègues de l'Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) dans le monde entier. Principales responsabilités Répondez à la ligne téléphonique Global Service Desk pour tous les utilisateurs de UBP dans le monde entier. Gérer les courriels envoyés à Global Service Desk. Gérer la charge de travail à partir de notre outil d'auto-titrage. Fournir une assistance à distance aux utilisateurs et essayer de résoudre le problème au premier appel. Créer des incidents avec des informations claires et explicites et affecter aux équipes de niveau 2 si nécessaire. Documentation sur les connaissances et mises à jour des procédures. Heures de travail: en semaine, couverture de 7h30 à 19h. Certification de l'institut d'aide à votre profil (CFC) ou équivalent. Une première expérience réussie dans un service de dépannage est obligatoire. Microsoft Certification du système d'exploitation sera un atout. La certification ITIL Foundation sera un atout. Expertise dans Microsoft Windows 11 et Microsoft 365 (Office 365) Expérience avec Citrix et les environnements VDI et avec connexion à distance (RSA Secure ID, Citrix Workspace). Connaissance de, Active Directory, GPO, SCCM, Réseautage. Connaissance de la mobilité : iOS et iPhone, iPad. Connaissance des outils de gestion des services JIRA. Fluent en français et en anglais; langues supplémentaires considérées comme un atout. Compétences Excellente pensée analytique et compétences en résolution de problèmes. Excellentes compétences en communication orale et écrite. Très orienté service client. Définition des priorités, capacité multitâche. Joueur d'équipe prêt à prendre possession. Capacité de travailler dans un environnement en évolution rapide. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Risk & Control Officer (Temporary 12 months)

titleByLocale.fr: Agent de contrôle des risques (période de 12 mois)

jobs.description:
Mission 
 The function is dedicated to a transversal project related to risk and control activities, co-sponsored by the Group Head of Risk Management and by the Group Head of Compliance. You will be a member of the project to support its deployment, in cooperation with Group Compliance, QA and Group Risk Management. 
 Group Risk Management (“GRM”) - as 2nd line of defence, deploys methodologies dedicated for example to risk and control assessments, incident managements as well as daily support to Business via four teams located in Geneva, dedicated to Treasury & Trading, Wealth Management, Asset Management and Operational risk in general. Teams also perform the oversight of the Bank’s activities across divisions, considering the Group risk appetite, current and emerging risk exposure. 
 Quality Assurance (“QA”) - Ensure the quality of the Bank’s Internal Control System (ICS) and the respect / proper execution of of the group Control Framework. Conducting investigations in relation to procedural and control issues and leading associated remediation activity.
 Group Compliance - as 2nd line of defence - ensure that the Bank conducts its business in compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies, and to manage the risk of legal or regulatory sanctions, financial loss, or loss to reputation the Bank may suffer as a result of failing to comply with such laws, regulations, and policies.
 
 Main responsibilities 
 Support 2nd line of defence and Divisions incl. Corporate Functions as 1st line of defence by: 
 Leading or participating to regular or dedicated risk and control assessments with Bank’s 1st line of defence, in line with risk and control methodologies defined by GRM and Group Compliance. 
 Performing control testing activities with GRM, Group Compliance and with Quality Assurance teams, from control deployment to control results presentation and action plan follow-up. 
 Monitoring the implementation of remediation plans to address identified gaps.
 Updating directives and procedures applicable to risk and control assessment, suggest/participate to communication plan and training plan, when applicable. 
 Participating to regular reporting to be dispatched and/or presented internally as well as to the Regulator. 
 
 Your Profile Risk management, Internal Control, Audit and/or Compliance background expected.
 A minimum of 3-4 years' experience required in the above activities.
 Strong analytical skills to assess risks and controls, and propose effective mitigation strategies.
 Strong understanding of business processes and rules and regulations of the financial sector, preferably within Private Banking;
 Strong organisational skills and ability to meet deadlines;
 Strong communication skills;
 Interest for project management;
 Solution-oriented attitude and ready to onboard tasks for proof-of-concepts; 
 Ability to work independently while maintaining a strong team cohesion and communication;
 Capacity to manage and accompany change;
 Excellent French and English.
 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione La funzione è dedicata a un progetto trasversale relativo alle attività di rischio e di controllo, co-sponsorizzato dal Responsabile Gruppo di Gestione dei Rischi e dal Responsabile Gruppo di Compliance. Sarete membri del progetto per sostenere la sua distribuzione, in collaborazione con Group Compliance, QA e Group Risk Management. Group Risk Management (“GRM”) – come seconda linea di difesa, distribuisce metodologie dedicate ad esempio a valutazioni di rischio e di controllo, gestione degli incidenti e supporto giornaliero a Business attraverso quattro squadre situate a Ginevra, dedicate al Tesoro & Trading, Wealth Management, Asset Management e rischio operativo in generale. I team svolgono anche la supervisione delle attività della Banca attraverso le divisioni, considerando l’appetito di rischio del Gruppo, l’esposizione al rischio attuale ed emergente. Garanzia di qualità (“QA”) - Assicurare la qualità del sistema di controllo interno della Banca (ICS) e il rispetto / corretta esecuzione del quadro di controllo del gruppo. Condurre indagini in relazione alle questioni procedurali e di controllo e alle principali attività di bonifica associate. Compliance di Gruppo - come seconda linea di difesa - assicurarsi che la Banca conduca la propria attività in conformità con le leggi, i regolamenti e le politiche interne applicabili, e di gestire il rischio di sanzioni legali o regolamentari, la perdita finanziaria o la perdita di reputazione che la Banca può soffrire a causa del mancato rispetto di tali leggi, regolamenti e politiche. Responsabilità principali Sostegno 2a linea di difesa e divisioni incl. Funzioni aziendali come prima linea di difesa: Leader o partecipando a valutazioni di rischio e controllo regolari o dedicate con la prima linea di difesa della Banca, in linea con le metodologie di rischio e controllo definite da GRM e Group Compliance. Eseguire attività di test di controllo con GRM, Compliance di Gruppo e con i team di Quality Assurance, dalla distribuzione di controllo al controllo della presentazione dei risultati e del follow-up del piano d'azione. Monitoraggio dell'attuazione dei piani di bonifica per affrontare lacune identificate. Aggiornare le direttive e le procedure applicabili alla valutazione del rischio e del controllo, suggerire/partecipare al piano di comunicazione e al piano di formazione, quando applicabile. Partecipare a una regolare segnalazione da inviare e/o presentata internamente e al Regolatore. Il tuo profilo Gestione del rischio, Controllo interno, Audit e/o Compliance sfondo previsto. Un'esperienza minima di 3-4 anni necessaria nelle suddette attività. Forte capacità analitiche per valutare i rischi e i controlli e proporre strategie di mitigazione efficaci. Forte comprensione dei processi aziendali e delle regole e dei regolamenti del settore finanziario, preferibilmente all'interno di Private Banking; Forte capacità organizzativa e capacità di soddisfare le scadenze; Forte capacità di comunicazione; Interessi per la gestione del progetto; atteggiamento orientato alla soluzione e pronto alle attività di bordo per la prova di concetti; Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente mantenendo una forte coesione e comunicazione del team; capacità di gestire e accompagnare il cambiamento; eccellente francese e inglese. Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission The function is dedicated to a transversal project related to risk and control activities, co-sponsored by the Group Head of Risk Management and by the Group Head of Compliance. descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Die Funktion ist einem transversalen Projekt im Zusammenhang mit Risiko- und Kontrolltätigkeiten gewidmet, das vom Konzernleiter Risikomanagement und vom Konzernleiter Compliance koordiniert wird. Sie werden Mitglied des Projekts sein, um seinen Einsatz in Zusammenarbeit mit Group Compliance, QA und Group Risk Management zu unterstützen. Group Risk Management (“GRM”) - als 2. Verteidigungslinie, stellt Methoden zur Verfügung, die zum Beispiel auf Risiko- und Kontrollbeurteilungen, Vorfallmanagement sowie tägliche Unterstützung für Business über vier Teams in Genf, gewidmet Treasury & Trading, Wealth Management, Asset Management und operatives Risiko im Allgemeinen. Darüber hinaus führen Teams die Aufsicht über die Aktivitäten der Bank im gesamten Geschäftsbereich durch, wobei die Risikobereitschaft der Gruppe, die aktuelle und die aufstrebende Risikoposition berücksichtigt werden. Qualitätssicherung ("QA") - Gewährleistung der Qualität des internen Kontrollsystems der Bank (ICS) und der Einhaltung / ordnungsgemäße Ausführung des Gruppenkontrollrahmens. Durchführung von Untersuchungen zu verfahrens- und kontrollrechtlichen Fragen und der damit verbundenen Heiltätigkeit. Group Compliance - als 2. Verteidigungslinie - stellt sicher, dass die Bank ihr Geschäft in Übereinstimmung mit den geltenden Gesetzen, Vorschriften und internen Politiken durchführt und das Risiko rechtlicher oder regulatorischer Sanktionen, finanziellen Verlust oder Verlust des Rufs der Bank durch die Nichteinhaltung solcher Gesetze, Vorschriften und Politiken zu verwalten. Hauptverantwortliche Unterstützung 2. Verteidigungslinie und Abteilungen inkl. Corporate Functions als 1. Verteidigungslinie von: Führen oder Teilnahme an regelmäßigen oder dedizierten Risiko- und Kontrollbewertungen mit der 1. Verteidigungslinie der Bank im Einklang mit Risiko- und Kontrollmethoden, die von GRM und Group Compliance definiert werden. Durchführung von Kontrolltests mit GRM, Group Compliance und mit Quality Assurance-Teams, von der Steuerungs-Bereitstellung bis zur Steuerung der Ergebnissepräsentation und dem Follow-up des Aktionsplans. Überwachung der Umsetzung von Sanierungsplänen zur Bewältigung identifizierter Lücken. Die Aktualisierung von Richtlinien und Verfahren, die für die Risiko- und Kontrollbeurteilung gelten, schlägt gegebenenfalls vor, den Kommunikationsplan und den Schulungsplan zu unterscheiden. Teilnahme an einer regelmäßigen Berichterstattung, die sowohl intern als auch dem Regulator übermittelt und/oder vorgelegt wird. Ihr Profil Risikomanagement, interne Kontrolle, Audit und/oder Compliance Hintergrund erwartet. Mindestens 3-4 Jahre Erfahrung in den oben genannten Aktivitäten erforderlich. Starke analytische Fähigkeiten, um Risiken und Kontrollen zu bewerten und effektive Minderungsstrategien vorzuschlagen. Starkes Verständnis von Geschäftsprozessen und Regeln und Vorschriften des Finanzsektors, vorzugsweise innerhalb von Private Banking; Starke organisatorische Fähigkeiten und Fähigkeit, Termine zu erfüllen; Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten; Interesse an Projektmanagement; Lösungsorientierte Haltung und bereit an Bord von Aufgaben für Nachweise von Konzepten; Fähigkeit, selbständig zu arbeiten und gleichzeitig eine starke Teamkohäsion und Kommunikation zu erhalten; Kapazität, den Wandel zu verwalten und zu begleiten; Ausgezeichnet Französisch und Englisch. Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission La fonction est dédiée à un projet transversal lié aux activités de risque et de contrôle, coparrainé par le chef de groupe de la gestion des risques et par le chef de groupe de la conformité. Vous serez membre du projet pour soutenir son déploiement, en coopération avec Conformité de Groupe, QA et Gestion des Risques de Groupe. Gestion des risques de groupe (GRM) - en tant que 2e ligne de défense, déploie des méthodologies dédiées par exemple aux évaluations des risques et des contrôles, à la gestion des incidents ainsi qu'au soutien quotidien aux entreprises par l'intermédiaire de quatre équipes situées à Genève, dédiées au Trésorerie et Trading, à la gestion de patrimoine, à la gestion d'actifs et au risque opérationnel en général. Les équipes surveillent également les activités de la Banque dans toutes les divisions, compte tenu de l'appétit du Groupe pour les risques, de l'exposition actuelle et émergente aux risques. Assurance de la qualité - Assurer la qualité du système de contrôle interne (SCI) de la Banque et le respect/l'exécution correcte du cadre de contrôle du groupe. Mener des enquêtes sur les questions de procédure et de contrôle et diriger les activités d'assainissement connexes. En tant que deuxième ligne de défense, la conformité de groupe garantit que la Banque mène ses activités conformément aux lois, aux règlements et aux politiques internes applicables, et gère les risques de sanctions légales ou réglementaires, de pertes financières ou de perte de réputation que la Banque peut subir en ne se conformant pas à ces lois, règlements et politiques. Principales responsabilités Appuyer la 2e ligne de défense et les divisions, y compris : Fonctions de l'entreprise en tant que 1ère ligne de défense par: Diriger ou participer à des évaluations régulières ou spécifiques des risques et des contrôles avec la Banque 1ère ligne de défense, conformément aux méthodes de risque et de contrôle définies par GRM et Conformité de groupe. Effectuer des essais de contrôle avec des équipes de GRM, de conformité de groupe et d'assurance de la qualité, depuis le déploiement du contrôle jusqu'à la présentation des résultats et au suivi du plan d'action. Surveillance de la mise en oeuvre des plans d'assainissement pour combler les lacunes identifiées. Mettre à jour les directives et les procédures applicables à l'évaluation des risques et des contrôles, suggérer ou participer au plan de communication et au plan de formation, le cas échéant. Participer à des rapports réguliers qui seront envoyés et/ou présentés à l'interne et à l'organisme de réglementation. Votre profil Gestion des risques, contrôle interne, vérification et/ou conformité. Un minimum de 3-4 ans d'expérience requis dans les activités ci-dessus. Des compétences analytiques solides pour évaluer les risques et les contrôles et proposer des stratégies d'atténuation efficaces. Une bonne compréhension des processus et des règles et réglementations du secteur financier, de préférence dans le cadre de la banque privée; De solides compétences en communication; Intérêt pour la gestion de projet; attitude orientée vers la solution et prêt à être à bord des tâches pour la preuve des concepts; Capacité de travailler de façon indépendante tout en maintenant une solide cohésion d'équipe et de communication; Capacité de gérer et d'accompagner le changement; Excellent français et anglais. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Quality Assurance Officer

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste de l ' assurance de la qualité

jobs.description:
Mission 
 Quality Assurance – Ensure the quality of the bank’s Internal Control System (ICS) and the respect / proper execution of of the group Control Framework. Conducting investigations in relation to procedural and control issues and leading associated remediation activity.
 Main responsibilities 
 General : Maintain a Group-wide and ‘team’ perspective in our project leadership and business support activities, balancing commercial and control requirements whilst recognising location differences where they need to be applied.
 Sensitivity to and knowledge of the external regulatory and internal policy framework, including the Bank’s global and regional Directives, Policies, Operating Procedures and controls to meet the Bank’s local regulatory requirements and to protect the business from financial, regulatory and reputational risk.
 Utilise highly effective and motivational people management & engagement skills, maximising resource utilisation at all times, maintaining professional standards with on-going training, and improving quality and performance year-on-year.
 
 Quality Assurance, Monitoring and Oversight: Support and monitor the bank’s Internal Control Framework (ICS), seeking continuous improvement and assuring the quality of its operations.
 Conduct, participate lead thematic reviews on local and group-wide topics.
 Perform assurance testing on key aspects of risk and controls, including independent control testing.
 Follow up on action points logged in the QA database and systems.
 Administration and monitoring of the ‘Change Management’ of the banks control framework
 Assist in the Implementation of the Management Functional Controls (MFCs) of the group.
 Provide input to, and represent, Quality Assurance in operational / regulatory initiatives or projects.
 
 Audits / Investigations and Remediation: Liaise, contribute and coordinate with internal/ external parties on reviews/ audits.
 Implement remedial actions relating to reviews / audits on control related issues.
 
 Training : Deliver Quality Assurance training for new joiners and new control owners.
 
 
 Your Profile 
 Strong understanding of risk management principles and tools.
 Strong understanding of regulatory requirements.
 Strong understanding of business processes and associated controls within financial institutions, preferably within Private Banking;
 Strong organisational skills and ability to meet deadlines;
 Strong communication, stakeholder engagement and relationship building skills;
 Strong analytical skills;
 Strong management and project management / co-ordination skills.
 Solution and improvement-oriented attitude.
 Ability to work independently while maintaining a strong team and management cohesion and communication.
 Excellent English command.
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Assicurazione sulla qualità della missione – Assicurare la qualità del sistema di controllo interno della banca (ICS) e il rispetto / corretta esecuzione del quadro di controllo del gruppo. Condurre indagini in relazione alle questioni procedurali e di controllo e alle principali attività di bonifica associate. Principali responsabilità Generali: Mantenere una prospettiva a livello di Gruppo e di “team” nelle nostre attività di leadership di progetto e supporto aziendale, bilanciare i requisiti commerciali e di controllo, riconoscendo le differenze di posizione in cui devono essere applicate. Sensibilità e conoscenza del quadro normativo e interno esterno, comprese le direttive globali e regionali della Banca, le politiche, le procedure operative e i controlli per soddisfare i requisiti normativi locali della Banca e per proteggere il business dal rischio finanziario, normativo e reputazionale. Utilizzare competenze di gestione e coinvolgimento delle persone altamente efficaci e motivazionali, massimizzare l'utilizzo delle risorse in ogni momento, mantenendo standard professionali con formazione in corso, e migliorare la qualità e le prestazioni anno su anno. Garanzia di qualità, monitoraggio e supervisione: Sostenere e monitorare il quadro di controllo interno della banca (ICS), cercando un miglioramento continuo e garantendo la qualità delle sue operazioni. Condurre, partecipare testare le recensioni tematiche su argomenti locali e di gruppo. Eseguire i test di garanzia sugli aspetti chiave del rischio e dei controlli, compresi i test di controllo indipendenti. Seguire i punti di azione registrati nel database e nei sistemi QA. Amministrazione e monitoraggio del quadro di controllo delle banche “Change Management” Assist nell’attuazione dei controlli funzionali di gestione (MFC) del gruppo. Fornire input a, e rappresentare, Quality Assurance in iniziative o progetti operativi / normativi. Audits / Investigations e Remediation: Liaise, contribuire e coordinare con parti interne/ esterne su recensioni/audit. Implementare azioni correttive relative a recensioni / audit su problemi relativi al controllo. Formazione: fornire qualità Formazione di assicurazione per nuovi soci e nuovi proprietari di controllo. Il tuo profilo Forte comprensione dei principi e degli strumenti di gestione del rischio. Forte comprensione dei requisiti normativi. Forte comprensione dei processi aziendali e dei controlli associati all'interno di istituzioni finanziarie, preferibilmente all'interno di Private Banking; Forte capacità organizzativa e capacità di soddisfare le scadenze; Forte comunicazione, impegno degli stakeholder e capacità di costruzione di relazioni; Forte capacità analitiche; Forte gestione e gestione del progetto / competenze di coordinamento. Soluzione e atteggiamento orientato al miglioramento. Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente mantenendo un team forte e la coesione e la comunicazione di gestione. Ottimo comando inglese. Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne

Durchführung von Untersuchungen zu verfahrens- und kontrollrechtlichen Fragen und der damit verbundenen Heiltätigkeit. Hauptverantwortliche Allgemeines: Bewahren Sie eine konzernweite und „Team“-Perspektive in unseren projektführenden und geschäftsführenden Aktivitäten, bilanzieren Sie die kaufmännischen und kontrollrechtlichen Anforderungen und würdigen Sie die Standortunterschiede, wenn sie angewendet werden müssen. Sensitivität und Kenntnis des Rahmens für externe Regulierungs- und Innenpolitik, einschließlich der globalen und regionalen Richtlinien, Politiken, operative Verfahren und Kontrollen der Bank, um den lokalen Regulierungsanforderungen der Bank gerecht zu werden und das Geschäft vor finanziellen, regulatorischen und reputalen Risiken zu schützen. Benutzen Sie hochwirksame und motivierende Personalmanagement- & Engagement-Fähigkeiten, maximieren Sie die Ressourcenauslastung zu jeder Zeit, halten Sie professionelle Standards mit laufenden Schulungen, und verbessern Sie Qualität und Leistung im Laufe des Jahres. Qualitätssicherung, Überwachung und Aufsicht: Unterstützung und Überwachung des Internen Kontrollrahmens der Bank (ICS), die kontinuierliche Verbesserung und Sicherstellung der Qualität ihrer Vorgänge. Dirigent, führe thematische Rezensionen zu lokalen und gruppenweiten Themen. Prüfen Sie die Prüfung der Sicherheit über Schlüsselaspekte von Risiko und Kontrollen, einschließlich unabhängiger Kontrolltests. Folgen Sie den in der QA-Datenbank und -Systeme eingeloggten Aktionspunkten. Verwaltung und Überwachung des „Change Management“ des Bankenkontrollrahmens Assist bei der Umsetzung der Management Functional Controls (MFCs) der Gruppe. Geben Sie Beiträge zu und vertreten, Qualitätssicherung in operationellen / regulatorischen Initiativen oder Projekten. Audits / Untersuchungen und Sanierung: Liaise, Beitrag und Koordination mit internen / externen Parteien auf Bewertungen / Audits. Durchführung von Abhilfemaßnahmen in Bezug auf Bewertungen / Audits zu Kontrollfragen. Ausbildung : Lieferqualität Assurance Training für neue Teilnehmer und neue Kontrollbesitzer. Ihr Profil Starkes Verständnis von Risikomanagementprinzipien und Tools. Starkes Verständnis der regulatorischen Anforderungen. Starkes Verständnis von Geschäftsprozessen und damit verbundenen Kontrollen innerhalb von Finanzinstituten, vorzugsweise innerhalb von Private Banking; Starke organisatorische Fähigkeiten und Fähigkeit, Termine zu erfüllen; Starke Kommunikation, Stakeholder Engagement und Beziehungsaufbau Fähigkeiten; Starke analytische Fähigkeiten; Starkes Management und Projektmanagement / Koordinationsfähigkeiten. Lösung und verbesserungsorientierte Haltung. Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten, während ein starkes Team und Management Kohäsion und Kommunikation. Hervorragendes Englisch-Befehl. Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Assurance de la qualité de la mission – Assurer la qualité du système de contrôle interne (SCI) de la banque et le respect et la bonne exécution du cadre de contrôle du groupe. Mener des enquêtes sur les questions de procédure et de contrôle et diriger les activités d'assainissement connexes. Principales responsabilités Général : Conservez une perspective à l'échelle du Groupe et de l'équipe dans nos activités de leadership de projet et de soutien aux entreprises, en conciliant les exigences commerciales et de contrôle tout en reconnaissant les différences de localisation où elles doivent être appliquées. Sensibilité et connaissance du cadre réglementaire et politique interne externe, y compris les directives, politiques, procédures et contrôles mondiaux et régionaux de la Banque, afin de satisfaire aux exigences réglementaires locales de la Banque et de protéger l'entreprise contre les risques financiers, réglementaires et de réputation. Utiliser des compétences hautement efficaces et motivantes en gestion des personnes et en engagement, maximiser l'utilisation des ressources en tout temps, maintenir des normes professionnelles avec une formation continue, et améliorer la qualité et la performance année après année. Assurance de la qualité, surveillance et surveillance : Soutenir et surveiller le cadre de contrôle interne (CSI) de la banque, en vue d'améliorer continuellement ses activités et d'en assurer la qualité. Mener des examens thématiques sur des sujets locaux et de groupe, y participer. Effectuer des tests d'assurance sur les principaux aspects des risques et des contrôles, y compris des tests de contrôle indépendants. Suivi des points d'action enregistrés dans la base de données et les systèmes d'AQ. Administration et suivi du «Changement Management» du cadre de contrôle bancaire Aider à la mise en œuvre des contrôles fonctionnels de gestion (CMF) du groupe. Fournir des commentaires sur l'assurance de la qualité et la représenter dans les initiatives ou les projets opérationnels et réglementaires. Vérifications / Enquêtes et mesures correctives : Assurer la liaison, la contribution et la coordination avec les parties internes/externes sur les examens/audits. Mettre en oeuvre des mesures correctives concernant les examens et les vérifications sur les questions liées au contrôle. Formation : Offrir la qualité Formation en assurance pour les nouveaux membres et les nouveaux propriétaires de contrôle. Votre profil Meilleure compréhension des principes et des outils de gestion du risque. Une bonne compréhension des exigences réglementaires. Compréhension approfondie des processus opérationnels et des contrôles connexes au sein des institutions financières, de préférence dans le secteur des banques privées; une communication solide, l'engagement des parties prenantes et l'acquisition de compétences en matière de relations; Des compétences analytiques élevées; Fortes compétences en gestion et en coordination de projets. Solution et attitude orientée vers l'amélioration. Capacité de travailler de façon indépendante tout en maintenant une solide cohésion d'équipe et de gestion et de communication. Excellente commande anglaise. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.title: Head of Internal Audit
jobs.description:
Job description 
 Head of Internal Audit, UBP UK 
 
 

 NAME: 
 
 
 CORPORATE JOB TITLE: 
 Head of Internal Audit, London 
 
 CORPORATE TITLE: 
 TBC 
 
 REPORTS TO: 
 CEO, UBP UK & 
 Group Head of Internal Audit & 
 Head of the Audit Committee (Member of the Board of Directors) 
 
 SENIOR MANAGEMENT FUNCTION (YES/NO): 
 Yes 
 
 PRESCRIBED RESPONSBILITY: 
 SMF 5 
 
 MATERIAL RISK TAKER (YES/NO): 
 Yes 
 
 CERTIFIED (YES/NO): 
 No 
 
 CERTIFIED FUNCTIONS: 
 
 
 
 LAST UPDATED: 
 March 2026 
 
 Main Responsibilities 
 This role will hold overall responsibility for Internal Audit across the UBP UK, providing risk-based objective assurance, advice and insight. UBP Internal Audit follows the standards of the profession, as well as the regulatory requirements and UBP Group policies and procedures. 
 The Head of Internal Audit is responsible for independent and objective audits reviews of all UBP UK activities, aiming at providing the Group with assurance as to how effectively it is controlling its operations, advises on improvements. The role also assesses the quality of risk management within an audited scope, the appropriateness and effectiveness of the permanent control framework, the risk sensitivity of management and compliance with codes of conduct and expected professional practices. 
 Role Duties 
 The Head of Audit is responsible for managing, planning, and administering the internal audit function in the UK, Channel Islands and Gibraltar regions for all activities of UBP UK. 
 Plan, supervise and take part in audits across all activities of UBP UK including financial, regulatory, compliance, operational audits as needed. 
 Develop and maintain good relationships with the head and key management personnel of all activity pillars across UBP UK. 
 Make recommendations for organisational and internal controls improvements of UBP UK. 
 Prepare Audit reports, and summaries of findings and audit reports and recommendations to the Group Audit department, as well as key management stakeholders of UBP UK. 
 Follow-up of Audit Recommendations until their implementation. 
 Make recommendations for improving the efficiency and effectiveness of the audit process. 
 Managing and engaging with various stakeholders across all departments of UBP UK at a senior level. 
 Liaise with external auditors and regulators. 
 
 
 The job description is not exhaustive and may include other duties as assigned from time to time by management. 
 
 Management and Supervision 
 Current line management responsibility for one Internal Audit Manager. 
 Set goals and objectives for all staff under direct supervision, complete performance appraisals and arrange appraisal interviews and ensure that the UBP UK guidelines are appropriately updated and communicated to staff. 
 
 Statements of Responsibility 
 Prescribed Responsibilities and Local Responsibilities for the Head of Internal Audit are set out in the Statements of Responsibility which is maintained as a separate document. 
 
 Conduct Rules 
 This role is required to comply with the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) Individual Conduct Rules, which are: 
 
 To act with integrity; 
 To act with due skill, care and diligence; 
 To be open and cooperative with the FCA, the Prudential Regulation Authoritity (PRA) and other regulators; 
 To pay due regard to the interests of customers and treat them fairly; 
 To observe proper standards of market conduct; and 
 To act to deliver good outcomes for retail customers. 
 
 In addition, this role must also comply with the Senior Manager Conduct Rules, which are: 
 
 To take reasonable steps to ensure that the business of the firm for which you are responsible is controlled effectively. 
 To take reasonable steps to ensure that the business of the firm for which you are responsible complies with the relevant requirements and standards of the regulatory system. 
 To take reasonable steps to ensure that any delegation of your responsibilities is to an appropriate person and that you oversee the discharge of the delegated responsibility effectively. 
 To disclose appropriately any information of which the FCA or PRA would reasonably expect notice. 
 
 Person Specification 
 Knowledge, Skills & Experience 
 
 Qualifications 
 Qualifications: Professional Audit/Accounting qualification or Degree is preferred (ACA, ACCA, CIA, etc.) 
 Good knowledge of accounting principles and professional audit standards. 
 Solid experience at a Head of Internal Audit or Senior Audit Manager level with an audit firm or a financial institution. 
 Working experience in both wealth management (essential) and asset management industries (preferred). 
 Experience managing audits across a broad range of activities, including financial, compliance, regulatory, operational, systems, etc. 
 Able to influence senior stakeholders whilst maintaining objectivity and independence 
 Written skills for preparing and delivering quality audit reports, as well as strong relationship building and communication skills to ensure the best outcome. 
 Knowledge of UK banking legislation, regulations and rules (PRA/FCA) 
 Excellent communicator and able to build relationships with internal and external stakeholders including regulators 
 Ability to influence senior stakeholders 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to assess complex situations and make sound decisions. 
 Demonstrated experience in developing and implementing compliance policies, and procedures. 
 On-going CPD (Continuous Professional Development) to ensure that adequate knowledge of the UK regulatory environment is maintained. 
 Suitably qualified to hold SMF 5. 
 
 Competencies and Values Required Level 
 
 Shows the drive to perform and be successful 5 
 Persistent in following-up and through on issues 5 
 Upholds the legal, regulatory and ethical standard of the UBP Group 5 
 Good product knowledge 4 
 Knowledge of legal regulatory and industry requirements 5 
 Business Development 3 
 Communication - listening, written and verbal with clients 5 
 Influencing 5 
 Relationship Building - internal and external 5 
 Strategic & commercial awareness 4 
 Planning & organising 4 
 Ethics and values 5 
 Customer focus 5 
 Explanation: 1: low level of competence / skill required, 2-3: average level of competence / skill required, 4-5: high level of competence skill required

Conduct Rules This role is required to comply with the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) Individual Conduct Rules, which are: To act with integrity; To act with due skill, care and diligence; To be open and cooperative with the FCA, the Prudential Regulation Authoritity (PRA) and other regulators; To pay due regard to the interests of customers and treat them fairly; To observe proper standards of market conduct; and To act to deliver good outcomes for retail customers. In addition, this role must also comply with the Senior Manager Conduct Rules, which are: To take reasonable steps to ensure that the business of the firm for which you are responsible is controlled effectively. To take reasonable steps to ensure that the business of the firm for which you are responsible complies with the relevant requirements and standards of the regulatory system. To take reasonable steps to ensure that any delegation of your responsibilities is to an appropriate person and that you oversee the discharge of the delegated responsibility effectively. To disclose appropriately any information of which the FCA or PRA would reasonably expect notice. Person Specification Knowledge, Skills & Experience Qualifications Qualifications: Professional Audit/Accounting qualification or Degree is preferred (ACA, ACCA, CIA, etc.) Good knowledge of accounting principles and professional audit standards. Solid experience at a Head of Internal Audit or Senior Audit Manager level with an audit firm or a financial institution. Working experience in both wealth management (essential) and asset management industries (preferred). Experience managing audits across a broad range of activities, including financial, compliance, regulatory, operational, systems, etc. Able to influence senior stakeholders whilst maintaining objectivity and independence Written skills for preparing and delivering quality audit reports, as well as strong relationship building and communication skills to ensure the best outcome. Knowledge of UK banking legislation, regulations and rules (PRA/FCA) Excellent communicator and able to build relationships with internal and external stakeholders including regulators Ability to influence senior stakeholders Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to assess complex situations and make sound decisions. Demonstrated experience in developing and implementing compliance policies, and procedures. On-going CPD (Continuous Professional Development) to ensure that adequate knowledge of the UK regulatory environment is maintained. Suitably qualified to hold SMF 5. Competencies and Values Required Level Shows the drive to perform and be successful 5 Persistent in following-up and through on issues 5 Upholds the legal, regulatory and ethical standard of the UBP Group 5 Good product knowledge 4 Knowledge of legal regulatory and industry requirements 5 Business Development 3 Communication - listening, written and verbal with clients 5 Influencing 5 Relationship Building - internal and external 5 Strategic & commercial awareness 4 Planning & organising 4 Ethics and values 5 Customer focus 5 Explanation: 1: low level of competence / skill required, 2-3: average level of competence / skill required, 4-5: high level of competence skill required
descriptionByLocale.en: Job description Head of Internal Audit, UBP UK NAME: CORPORATE JOB TITLE: Head of Internal Audit, London CORPORATE TITLE: TBC REPORTS TO: CEO, UBP UK & Group Head of Internal Audit & Head of the Audit Committee (Member of the Board of Directors) SENIOR MANAGEMENT FUNCTION (YES/NO): Yes PRESCRIBED RESPONSBILITY: SMF 5 MATERIAL RISK TAKER (YES/NO): Yes CERTIFIED (YES/NO): No CERTIFIED FUNCTIONS: LAST UPDATED: March 2026 Main Responsibilities This role will hold overall responsibility for Internal Audit across the UBP UK, providing risk-based objective assurance, advice and insight. UBP Internal Audit follows the standards of the profession, as well as the regulatory requirements and UBP Group policies and procedures. The Head of Internal Audit is responsible for independent and objective audits reviews of all UBP UK activities, aiming at providing the Group with assurance as to how effectively it is controlling its operations, advises on improvements. The role also assesses the quality of risk management within an audited scope, the appropriateness and effectiveness of the permanent control framework, the risk sensitivity of management and compliance with codes of conduct and expected professional practices. Role Duties The Head of Audit is responsible for managing, planning, and administering the internal audit function in the UK, Channel Islands and Gibraltar regions for all activities of UBP UK. Plan, supervise and take part in audits across all activities of UBP UK including financial, regulatory, compliance, operational audits as needed. Develop and maintain good relationships with the head and key management personnel of all activity pillars across UBP UK. Make recommendations for organisational and internal controls improvements of UBP UK. Prepare Audit reports, and summaries of findings and audit reports and recommendations to the Group Audit department, as well as key management stakeholders of UBP UK. Follow-up of Audit Recommendations until their implementation. Make recommendations for improving the efficiency and effectiveness of the audit process. Managing and engaging with various stakeholders across all departments of UBP UK at a senior level. Liaise with external auditors and regulators. The job description is not exhaustive and may include other duties as assigned from time to time by management. Management and Supervision Current line management responsibility for one Internal Audit Manager. Set goals and objectives for all staff under direct supervision, complete performance appraisals and arrange appraisal interviews and ensure that the UBP UK guidelines are appropriately updated and communicated to staff. jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: WM Cross-Border Specialist (9 months contract)

titleByLocale.fr: WM Spécialiste de la frontière (contrat de 9 mois)

jobs.description:
Mission 
 The Business Monitoring team is one of the most transversal activities within Wealth Management (WM). In this team, your role will be to bring support and expertise to WM function in all aspects relating to cross border regulatory framework. 
 
 Main responsibilities 
 Ensure full availability of country manuals and e-learnings according to markets covered by the Wealth Management & Asset Management activities 
 Ensure timely completion of trainings by WM Front Office 
 Coordinate trainings with the support of Learning & Development team 
 Manage the relationship with the external Country Manuals provider 
 Ensure appropriate adaptation of provider’s manuals to the Bank’s Risk Appetite and strategy 
 Maintain and develop the Cross Border’s control framework in adequation with the overall control framework (investment and banking services restrictions, sanctions, etc) 
 Maintain and develop the MIS and reporting around Cross Border control framework and activities 
 Develop and perform control activities around Cross Border framework (thematic reviews, business trips, investments, conduct,…) 
 Any other task required by Management in the context of the employee’s main mission 
 

 Your Profile 
 Degree in a related field (bachelor in Finance, banking apprenticeship, CYP, banking internship or similar) 
 High proficiency in MS Office including Excel & Powerpoint 
 Knowledge in Power BI, SQL, Power Query, Business Object are a plus 
 Minimum 3 years of experience in Cross Border management in a Swiss Private Bank 
 Proficiency in Compliance and Regulatory matters surrounding WM business in Switzerland (FinSA) 
 Strong analytical, organizational and research skills as well as curious & open mindset, flexibility, team-player and goal oriented 
 Fluent in French and English. Any additional language is a plus 
 
 Others 
 Swiss Residence 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Il team di Business Monitoring è una delle attività più trasversali all'interno della Wealth Management (WM). In questo team, il vostro ruolo sarà quello di portare il supporto e la competenza alla funzione WM in tutti gli aspetti relativi al quadro normativo transfrontaliero. Assicurare la piena disponibilità di manuali di paese e e-learnings in base ai mercati coperti dalle attività di Wealth Management & Asset Management Assicurare il completamento tempestivo delle formazioni da parte di WM Front Office Coordinate formazioni con il supporto del team di Learning & Development Gestire il rapporto con il fornitore esterno dei manuali di paese Assicurare l'adattamento appropriato dei manuali di sviluppo al controllo della Banca Qualsiasi altro compito richiesto dalla Direzione nel contesto della missione principale del dipendente Il tuo grado di profilo in un campo correlato (bachelor in Finanza, apprendistato bancario, CYP, stage bancari o simili) Alta competenza in MS Office, tra cui Excel & Powerpoint Knowledge in Power BI, SQL, Power Query, Business Object sono un plus Minimo 3 anni di esperienza in Cross Border management in una Swiss Private Bank Proficiency in Compliance e questioni regolamentari che circondano WM business in Svizzera (FinSA) Forte analitica, capacità organizzative e di ricerca, nonché curioso & mentalità aperta, flessibilità, team-player e obiettivo orientato Fluent in francese e inglese. Qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva è un plus Others Swiss Residence Core Competenza: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Das Business Monitoring-Team ist eine der transversalen Aktivitäten im Bereich Wealth Management (WM). In diesem Team wird Ihre Rolle darin bestehen, die WM-Funktion in allen Aspekten des grenzüberschreitenden Rechtsrahmens zu unterstützen und zu kennen. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Vollständige Verfügbarkeit von Landhandbüchern und E-Learnings nach Märkten, die von der Wealth Management & Asset Management-Aktivitäten abgedeckt sind. Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Schulungen von WM Front Office Coordinate Trainings mit Unterstützung von Learning & Development Team rechtzeitig abgeschlossen werden. Jede andere Aufgabe, die das Management im Rahmen der Hauptaufgabe des Mitarbeiters benötigt Ihr Profil Grad in einem verwandten Bereich (Bachelor in Finanzen, Banklehre, CYP, Bankpraktikum oder dergleichen) Hohe Kenntnisse in MS Office einschließlich Excel & Powerpoint Knowledge in Power BI, SQL, Power Query, Business Object sind ein Plus Minimum 3 Jahre Erfahrung in Cross Border Management in einer Schweizer Privatbank Proficiency in Compliance und Regulatory Angelegenheiten rund um das WM-Geschäft in der Schweiz (FinSA) Starke analytische, organisatorische und Forschungsfähigkeiten sowie neugierige & offene Denkweise, Flexibilität, Teamplayer und zielorientierte Flöte in Französisch und Englisch. Jede weitere Sprache ist ein Plus Andere Swiss Residence Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s Values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with Regulations and interne Directives
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission L'équipe de surveillance des activités est l'une des activités les plus transversales au sein de la Gestion de patrimoine. Au sein de cette équipe, votre rôle sera d'apporter soutien et expertise à la fonction de GM dans tous les aspects liés au cadre réglementaire transfrontalier. Responsabilités principales Assurer la pleine disponibilité des manuels nationaux et des apprentissages en ligne selon les marchés couverts par les activités de gestion de patrimoine et de gestion des actifs Assurer l'achèvement en temps opportun des formations par le bureau de front de la GM Coordonner les formations avec l'appui de l'équipe d'apprentissage et de développement Gérer les relations avec le fournisseur externe de manuels nationaux Veiller à l'adaptation appropriée des manuels du fournisseur à la Banque.Risque Appétit et stratégie Maintenir et développer le cadre de contrôle transfrontalier en équation avec le cadre de contrôle global (restrictions en matière d'investissement et de services bancaires, sanctions, etc.) Maintenir et développer le SIG et les rapports autour du cadre et des activités de contrôle transfrontalier Élaborer et exécuter des activités de contrôle autour du cadre transfrontalier (examens thématiques, voyages d'affaires, investissements, conduite, etc.) Toute autre tâche requise par la direction dans le contexte de la mission principale de l'employé Votre profil Diplôme dans un domaine connexe (bachelor en finance, apprentissage bancaire, CYP, stage bancaire ou similaire) Haute compétence en MS Office y compris Excel & Powerpoint Knowledge in Power BI, SQL, Power Query, Business Object sont un plus minimum de 3 ans d'expérience en gestion transfrontalière dans une banque privée suisse Compétence en conformité et en réglementation concernant les affaires WM en Suisse (FinSA) Fortes compétences analytiques, organisationnelles et de recherche ainsi que curieux et ouvert état d'esprit, flexibilité, team-player et axé sur les objectifs Fluent en français et en anglais. Toute autre langue est un plus Autres Swiss Residence Core Compétences : Adhérence à l'entreprise Valeurs : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité avec les règlements et les directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Facilities Officer (Temporary)
jobs.description:
Mission 
 Veiller à la maintenance et à la sécurité des locaux tout en assurant le bien-être de leurs occupants.
Capacité à trouver des solutions efficaces et pragmatiques répondant aux besoins techniques des utilisateurs
 
 Main responsibilities Répondre aux demandes des collaborateurs sur les problématiques liées aux locaux et équipements.
 Effectuer les petites réparations et interventions de maintenance de premier niveau.
 Contrôler l'état général des bâtiments et signaler les anomalies.
 Coordonner et accompagner les prestataires lors des interventions en s'assurant du respect des règles de sécurité de la banque.
 Vérifier visuellement les installations techniques et remonter les différents problèmes.
 Participer à l'organisation des espaces de travail.
 Effectuer des déménagements internes et des mises en place de mobiliers.
 Participer à la gestion des stocks de fournitures et passer les commandes validées par le responsable.
 Vérifier le bon fonctionnement des équipements de sécurité.
 Appliquer les consignes de sécurité de la banque.
 Participer au piquet technique.
 
 
 Your Profile Expérience attendue de Facilities officer en interne ou dans une société de service. 
 Connaissances en bâtiment. 
o Electricité : vérification des installations et relamping. 
o Plomberie : Débouchage de canalisations simples et entretien des sanitaires. 
o Serrurerie/Menuiserie : Ajustement portes des fenêtres et du mobilier, changement des serrures. 
o Revêtement : remplacement de revêtement sols.
 Polyvalence et autonomie dans l'exécution des tâches. 
 Réactivité et capacité à gérer les urgences. 
 Sens du service et excellent relationnel. 
 Rigueur et respect des consignes. 
 
 
 Background High School/ Maturité / Baccalauréat 
 Connaissances en sécurité incendie et accessibilité des bâtiments. 
 Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. 
 
 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Missione Per garantire la manutenzione e la sicurezza dei locali, assicurando al contempo il benessere dei loro occupanti. Capacità di trovare soluzioni efficaci e pragmatiche che rispondano alle esigenze tecniche degli utenti Principali responsabilità Risponde alle esigenze dei dipendenti in materia di locali e attrezzature. Eseguire riparazioni minori e interventi di manutenzione di primo livello. Monitorare le condizioni generali di edifici e segnalare anomalie. Coordinare e supportare i fornitori in interventi garantendo il rispetto delle regole di sicurezza bancaria. Controllare visivamente le installazioni tecniche e tracciare i vari problemi. Partecipa all'organizzazione di spazi di lavoro. Internamente mobili e l'installazione di mobili. Partecipa alla gestione delle scorte di forniture e degli ordini di posto convalidati dal gestore. Controllare il corretto funzionamento delle apparecchiature di sicurezza. Applicare le istruzioni di sicurezza della banca. Partecipa al picket tecnico. La tua esperienza di profilo si aspettava da Servizi ufficiali in-house o in una società di servizi. Costruire la conoscenza. o Elettricità: verifica della struttura e rilamping. o Plumbing: Semplice apertura tubi e manutenzione sanitaria. o Serrature/Menuiserie: Regolazione di porte finestre e mobili, cambio di serrature. o Rivestimento: rivestimento pavimento sostituzione. Versatilità e autonomia nell'esecuzione dei compiti. Reattività e capacità di gestire le emergenze. Senso di servizio e rapporto eccellente. Rigor e conformità. Sfondo High School/Maturity / Corso di laurea Conoscenza della sicurezza antincendio e accessibilità degli edifici. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Competenze fondamentali: appartenenza alla società - conformità con le normative e le linee guida interne
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission To ensure the maintenance and safety of the premises while ensuring the well-being of their occupants. Ability to find effective and pragmatic solutions that meet the technical needs of users Main responsibilities Respond to the demands of employees on issues related to premises and equipment. Perform minor repairs and first-level maintenance interventions. Monitor general condition of buildings and report anomalies. Coordinate and support providers in interventions by ensuring compliance with bank security rules. Visually check the technical installations and trace the various problems. Participate in the organization of work spaces. Internally moving and installing furniture. Participate in the management of supplies stocks and place orders validated by the manager. Check the proper functioning of safety equipment. Apply the bank's security instructions. Participate in the technical picket. Your Profile Experience expected from Facilities officer in-house or in a service company. Building knowledge. o Electricity: facility verification and relamping. o Plumbing: Simple pipe opening and sanitary maintenance. o Locks/Menuiserie: Adjustment of windows and furniture doors, change of locks. o Coating: floor covering replacement. Versatility and autonomy in the performance of tasks. Reactivity and capacity to manage emergencies. Service sense and excellent relationship. Rigor and compliance. Background High School/Maturity / Bachelor's degree Knowledge of fire safety and accessibility of buildings. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Core Competencies : Adherence to the company - Compliance with regulations and internal guidelines
descriptionByLocale.de: Mission Um die Wartung und Sicherheit der Räumlichkeiten zu gewährleisten und gleichzeitig das Wohlbefinden ihrer Insassen zu gewährleisten. Fähigkeit, effektive und pragmatische Lösungen zu finden, die den technischen Bedürfnissen der Nutzer gerecht werden Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Beantworten Sie den Anforderungen der Mitarbeiter zu Fragen im Zusammenhang mit Räumlichkeiten und Ausrüstung. Führen Sie kleinere Reparaturen und erstklassige Wartungseingriffe durch. Überwachen Sie den allgemeinen Zustand von Gebäuden und melden Sie Anomalien. Koordinierende und unterstützende Anbieter in Interventionen, indem die Einhaltung der Banksicherheitsvorschriften gewährleistet wird. Überprüfen Sie die technischen Installationen visuell und verfolgen Sie die verschiedenen Probleme. Nehmen Sie an der Organisation von Arbeitsräumen teil. Intern bewegen und installieren Möbel. Beteiligen Sie sich an der Verwaltung von Vorräten und Ortsaufträgen, die vom Manager validiert wurden. Überprüfen Sie die ordnungsgemäße Funktion der Sicherheitsausrüstung. Bewerben Sie die Sicherheitshinweise der Bank. Beteiligen Sie sich am technischen Picket. Ihre Profil-Erfahrung erwartet von Facilities Officer in-house oder in einem Service-Unternehmen. Wissen aufbauen. o Elektrizität: Anlagenverifikation und -wiederholung. o Sanitär: Einfache Rohröffnung und sanitäre Wartung. o Schlösser/Menuiserie: Einstellen von Fenstern und Möbeltüren, Wechsel von Schlössern. o Beschichtung: Bodenbelag Ersatz. Vielseitigkeit und Autonomie bei der Erfüllung von Aufgaben. Reaktivität und Fähigkeit, Notfälle zu verwalten. Service Sinn und ausgezeichnete Beziehung. Rigor und Compliance. Hintergrund High School/Maturity / Bachelor-Studie Kenntnisse der Brandsicherheit und Zugänglichkeit von Gebäuden. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Kernkompetenzen: Haftung für das Unternehmen - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: Mission Veiller à la maintenance et à la sécurité des locaux tout en assurant le bien-être de leurs occupants. Capacité à trouver des solutions efficaces et pragmatiques répondant aux besoins techniques des utilisateurs Main responsibilities Répondre aux demandes des collaborateurs sur les problématiques liées aux locaux et équipements. Effectuer les petites réparations et interventions de maintenance de premier niveau. Contrôler l'état général des bâtiments et signaler les anomalies. Coordonner et accompagner les prestataires lors des interventions en s'assurant du respect des règles de sécurité de la banque. Vérifier visuellement les installations techniques et remonter les différents problèmes. Participer à l'organisation des espaces de travail. Effectuer des déménagements internes et des mises en place de mobiliers. Participer à la gestion des stocks de fournitures et passer les commandes validées par le responsable. Vérifier le bon fonctionnement des équipements de sécurité. Appliquer les consignes de sécurité de la banque. Participer au piquet technique. Your Profile Expérience attendue de Facilities officer en interne ou dans une société de service. Connaissances en bâtiment. o Electricité : vérification des installations et relamping. o Plomberie : Débouchage de canalisations simples et entretien des sanitaires. o Serrurerie/Menuiserie : Ajustement portes des fenêtres et du mobilier, changement des serrures. o Revêtement : remplacement de revêtement sols. Polyvalence et autonomie dans l'exécution des tâches. Réactivité et capacité à gérer les urgences. Sens du service et excellent relationnel. Rigueur et respect des consignes. Background High School/ Maturité / Baccalauréat Connaissances en sécurité incendie et accessibilité des bâtiments. Excel, GMAO, Ticketing. Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

jobs.title: Graduate Programme - Operations office team

titleByLocale.fr: Programme d'études supérieures - équipe du bureau des opérations

jobs.description:
The Bank’s entire operations are managed by COO Division and are headed up by the Chief Operating Officer. It strives to provide both in-house and external clients with a first-rate service to ensure our business operates efficiently and at the best possible cost. The COO division comprises Operations, Finance, Information Management, Human Resources and Logistics. COO employees are committed to providing, with professionalism and enthusiasm, an efficient, proactive, high-quality service that meets the needs of clients within the context of the Bank’s overall strategy. 
 Mission : 
 Permanent contract and training programme of 12 months, based on a rotation through various departments of the COO team 

 The purpose is to acquire targeted professional skills as well as practical experience 

 You will learn to manage projects, build stakeholder relationships, and conduct change management 

 You will be supported by a mentor, and a “buddy” during the entire programme 

 This programme is dedicated to young graduates, with a Master’s degree and a maximum of 12 months’ global professional experience, seeking to discover the Banking industry 

 It includes the prospect of obtaining a permanent role within UBP Operations Team 
 

 Main responsibilities : 
 1. Operations – Monitoring and Reconciliations 
 Understand the role of the Operations department, and the roles of the different teams within Operations 

 Understand Operations processes and propose process improvements where applicable 

 Participate in coordination tasks of transversal topics / projects within Operations department 

 Help to realise reportings and collect inputs from other teams on regular reportings 

 Understand and support Reconciliation’s activity and investigations 
 

 2. Banking Operations 
 Join an Operations team 

 Understand the role of the Operations department, and the roles of the different teams within Operations 

 Understand Operations processes and propose process improvements where applicable 

 Support the processes of the teams in line with internal procedures and policies 

 Support the cash services and securities services by discovering transfers, treasury operations, stock exchange and settlement activities. 

 
 3. Risk management department 
 Join the risk management team 

 Understand the different roles within the risk team 

 Understand Operational risk going through incident management, RCSA… 

 Support risk processes 

 
 Your Profile : 
 Master’s degree in finance or Information Technology obtained recently at a highly recognised university 

 Maximum 12 months’ professional experience 

 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, ability to partner with other teams 

 Fluent in French and English; any other language would be a plus 

 Excellent knowledge of the Microsoft Office suite especially Excel, programming skills is a plus 

 Strong critical thinking, analytical and problem-solving skills 

 Team player 

 
 Others : Swiss Residence
 
 
 Applications : 
 Applications must be made through our careers website and must include a CV and a cover letter. 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: Le operazioni della Banca sono gestite dalla Divisione COO e sono dirette dal Chief Operating Officer. Si sforza di fornire sia clienti interni che esterni con un servizio di prima classe per garantire il nostro business funziona in modo efficiente e al miglior costo possibile. La divisione COO comprende operazioni, finanza, gestione dell'informazione, risorse umane e logistica. I dipendenti di COO si impegnano a fornire, con professionalità ed entusiasmo, un servizio efficiente, proattivo, di alta qualità che soddisfi le esigenze dei clienti nel contesto della strategia globale della Banca. Missione: Programma di contratto e di formazione permanente di 12 mesi, basato su una rotazione attraverso vari dipartimenti del team COO Lo scopo è quello di acquisire competenze professionali mirate e l'esperienza pratica Imparerai a gestire progetti, costruire relazioni con gli stakeholder e condurre la gestione dei cambiamenti Sarete sostenuti da un mentore, e un “buddy” durante l’intero programma Questo programma è dedicato ai giovani laureati, con un Master e un massimo di 12 mesi di esperienza professionale globale, cercando di scoprire il settore bancario Comprende la prospettiva di ottenere un ruolo permanente all’interno del Team Operazioni UBP Principali responsabilità: 1. Operazioni – Monitoraggio e Riconciliazioni Comprendere il ruolo del reparto Operazioni, e i ruoli dei diversi team all’interno dei processi Operazioni Comprendere i processi e proporre miglioramenti dei processi in cui applicabile Partecipare ai compiti di coordinamento di argomenti / progetti trasversali all’interno del reparto Operazioni Aiuta a realizzare report e raccogliere input da altri team sulle relazioni regolari attività di reportistica. Comprendere il ruolo del dipartimento Operazioni, e i ruoli dei diversi team all'interno dei processi Operazioni Comprendere Operazioni e proporre miglioramenti dei processi, laddove applicabile Sostenere i processi dei team in linea con le procedure e le politiche interne Sostenere i servizi in denaro e i servizi in titoli scoprendo trasferimenti, operazioni di tesoreria, azioni di borsa e attività di regolamento. 3. Reparto di gestione del rischio Partecipa al team di gestione del rischio Comprendere i diversi ruoli all'interno del team di rischio Comprendere il rischio operativo attraverso la gestione degli incidenti, RCSA... Supporto processi di rischio Il tuo profilo: Laurea magistrale in finanza o Information Technology ottenuta recentemente in un'università altamente riconosciuta Esperienza professionale di massimo 12 mesi Ottima comunicazione e competenze interpersonali, capacità di partner con altri team Fluent in francese e inglese; qualsiasi altra lingua sarebbe un plus Eccellente conoscenza della suite Microsoft Office in particolare Excel, le competenze di programmazione è un più Forte pensiero critico, analitico e problem solving competenze Team player Altro: Swiss Residence Applicazioni: Le applicazioni devono essere fatte attraverso il nostro CV Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell’azienda: Dedicazione, Convizione, Agility e Responsabilità - Rispetto dei regolamenti e delle direttive interne
