descriptionByLocale.de: Die gesamten Geschäfte der Bank werden von der Division COO verwaltet und vom Chief Operating Officer geleitet. Es ist bestrebt, sowohl interne als auch externe Kunden mit einem erstklassigen Service zu versorgen, um sicherzustellen, dass unser Unternehmen effizient und zu bestmöglichen Kosten arbeitet. Die Division COO umfasst Operationen, Finanzen, Informationsmanagement, Personal und Logistik. COO-Mitarbeiter sind verpflichtet, mit Professionalität und Begeisterung einen effizienten, proaktiven, hochwertigen Service zu bieten, der den Bedürfnissen der Kunden im Rahmen der Gesamtstrategie der Bank entspricht. Mission : Ständiges Vertrags- und Ausbildungsprogramm von 12 Monaten, basierend auf einer Rotation durch verschiedene Abteilungen des COO-Teams Ziel ist es, gezielte berufliche Fähigkeiten sowie praktische Erfahrungen zu erwerben Sie werden lernen, Projekte zu verwalten, Stakeholder-Beziehungen aufzubauen und Change Management durchzuführen Sie werden von einem Mentor und einem „Buddy“ während des gesamten Programms unterstützt. Dieses Programm ist jungen Absolventen gewidmet, mit einem Master-Abschluss und maximal 12 Monate globale Berufserfahrung, die Suche nach der Banking Industrie Es umfasst die Aussicht auf eine dauerhafte Rolle innerhalb des UBP Operations Teams Hauptverantwortlichkeiten: 1. Operationen – Monitoring und Konsiliamente Verstehen Sie die Rolle der Abteilung Operationen, und die Rollen der verschiedenen Teams innerhalb der Operationen Verstehen Operationen Prozesse und schlagen Prozessverbesserungen vor, soweit zutreffend. Banking Operations Begleiten Sie ein operatives Team Die Rolle der operativen Abteilung und die Rolle der verschiedenen Teams innerhalb der operativen Prozesse verstehen und gegebenenfalls Prozessverbesserungen vorschlagen Unterstützung der Prozesse der Teams im Einklang mit internen Verfahren und Politiken Unterstützung der Cash Services und Wertpapierdienstleistungen durch die Entdeckung von Transfers, Treasury-Operationen, Börsen- und Abwicklungsaktivitäten. 3. Risikomanagement-Abteilung Nehmen Sie dem Risikomanagement-Team die verschiedenen Rollen innerhalb des Risikoteams zu verstehen Operationelles Risiko durch Vorfallmanagement, RCSA... Ihr Profil : Master-Abschluss in der Finanz- oder Informationstechnologie vor kurzem an einer anerkannten Universität erhalten Maximale 12 Monate Berufserfahrung Ausgezeichnete Kommunikation und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten, die Fähigkeit, mit anderen Teams zusammenzuarbeiten Flöten in Französisch und Englisch; jede andere Sprache wäre ein Plus Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse der Microsoft Office-Suite vor allem Excel, Programmierkenntnisse sind ein Plus starkes kritisches Denken, analytisches und Problem-Lösungsfähigkeit Teamplayer Andere: Swiss Residence Applications durch Kernkompetenzen: Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens: Hingabe, Konviktion, Agilität und Verantwortung - Einhaltung von Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'ensemble des opérations de la Banque est géré par la Division des opérations de maintien de la paix et dirigé par le chef de l'exploitation. Il s'efforce de fournir aux clients internes et externes un service de premier ordre pour assurer le fonctionnement efficace de notre entreprise au meilleur coût possible. La division du COO comprend les opérations, les finances, la gestion de l'information, les ressources humaines et la logistique. Les employés du COO s'engagent à fournir, avec professionnalisme et enthousiasme, un service efficace, proactif et de haute qualité qui répond aux besoins des clients dans le contexte de la stratégie globale de la Banque. Mission : Contrat permanent et programme de formation de 12 mois, basé sur une rotation par l'intermédiaire de différents départements de l'équipe COO. Vous apprendrez à gérer des projets, à établir des relations avec les intervenants et à gérer le changement. Vous serez soutenu par un mentor, et un "buddy" pendant tout le programme Ce programme est dédié aux jeunes diplômés, avec un Master et un maximum de 12 mois d'expérience professionnelle mondiale, cherchant à découvrir le secteur bancaire Il comprend la perspective d'obtenir un rôle permanent au sein de l'équipe des opérations de l'UBP Principales responsabilités : 1. Opérations – Surveillance et rapprochements Comprendre le rôle du département des opérations, et les rôles des différentes équipes au sein des opérations Comprendre les processus des opérations et proposer des améliorations de processus, le cas échéant Participer aux tâches de coordination des sujets transversaux / projets au sein du département des opérations Aider à réaliser les rapports et recueillir les commentaires d'autres équipes sur les rapports réguliers Comprendre et appuyer les activités et les enquêtes de réconciliation 2. Opérations bancaires Rejoindre une équipe des opérations Comprendre le rôle du service des opérations, et les rôles des différentes équipes au sein des opérations Comprendre les processus des opérations et proposer des améliorations de processus, le cas échéant Appuyer les processus des équipes conformément aux procédures et politiques internes Appuyer les services de trésorerie et les services de valeurs mobilières en découvrant les transferts, les opérations de trésorerie, la bourse et les activités de règlement. 3. Département de gestion des risques Rejoindre l'équipe de gestion des risques Comprendre les différents rôles au sein de l'équipe de risque Comprendre le risque opérationnel en passant par la gestion des incidents, RCSA... Supporter les processus de risque Votre profil : Master en finance ou en technologie de l'information obtenu récemment dans une université hautement reconnue Maximum 12 mois d'expérience professionnelle Excellente communication et aptitudes interpersonnelles, capacité de partenariat avec d'autres équipes Fluent en français et en anglais ; toute autre langue serait un plus Excellente connaissance de la suite Microsoft Office en particulier Excel, compétences en programmation est un plus Forte pensée critique, capacités d'analyse et de résolution de problèmes Joueur d'équipe Autres : Résidence suisse Applications : Les candidatures doivent être faites sur notre site web de carrière et doivent comprendre un CV et une lettre de motivation. Compétences de base : Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Respect des règlements et des directives internes

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Graduate Programme – Group Risk Management team

titleByLocale.it: Programma di laurea – Gruppo Risk Management team
titleByLocale.en: Graduate Programme – Group Risk Management team
titleByLocale.fr: Graduate Programme – Group Risk Management team

jobs.description:
The risk management activities with the Group are supervised by Group Risk Management, headed up by the Group Head of Risk Management (“CRO”). Risk Management Teams located in Switzerland are in charge to oversight the Bank activities in Switzerland and to coordinate methodologies, deploy transversal risk activities and key projects with Local Risk Management Representatives at Group level. In Switzerland, Teams are composed by Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team and Operational Risk Team, while a project Team provide a transversal support on key projects or initiatives leaded by CRO or Team Heads. Acting as 2nd line of defence, Teams all provide advisory to Business, participate to local Committees, perform controls, challenge and support risk assessments and their response plans in coordination with Risk Owners. 
 
 Mission 
 
As of 1 September 2026, Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is offering a permanent position within its Group Risk Management teams (2nd line of defence) in Geneva, starting with a 12‑month training program that includes regular interactions with other Bank functions and Legal Entity representatives across the Group.
The purpose is to acquire targeted professional skills as well as practical experience with a strong orientation on risk management and secondly on project management.
 Rotations 
 The program consists of four three month rotations across the following teams: 
 Group Risk Management Project Team
 Wealth Management Team, 1st Line of Defence 
 Risk Management Team, 2nd Line of Defence (Luxembourg) 
 Bank’s Change Management Team (Transversal Projects), part of the Group COO teams
 
 
 Main responsibilities 
 During the program, under the supervision of the team managers in their role of mentor, the Graduate is expected to provide support on all teams’ activities as well as assist them in their daily tasks, with in particular:
 Participate and perform to Risk assessments and Control assessment exercises across the Bank / the location.
 Suggest risk and/or control methodologies enhancements.
 Perform control activities and present outcome internally.
 Participate to projects, in cooperation with teams and Subject-Matter-Experts.
 Participate and perform thematic reviews and formulate enhancement opportunities.
 Prepare reporting to Senior Management.
 
 
 During the program, you will also have the possibility to start a certification related to Banking sector and/or your function, for examples the CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) or CIA (Certified Internal Auditor), further enhancing your professional development.
 
 Your Profile 
 Background 
 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in finance, business management recently obtained from a highly recognised university or equivalent.
 Maximum 12-months’ professional experience.
 Knowledges 
 Good understanding of banking / financial sector, interest for Private Banking model and challenge / regulations.
 Knowledge of risk management and/or control activities an expectation. 
 Experience in project management a plus.
 Strong analytical skills, strong presentation skills.
 Technical Skills 
 Excellent knowledge of the Microsoft Office tools especially Excel, PowerPoint.
 Knowledge in Power BI a plus.
 Fluent in English and French (minimum C1 in both).
 Specific Competencies 
 High motivation, attention to details, excellent organization skills and strong attention to deadline 
 Discretion as a need-to-have
 Multi-tasking and solutions oriented
 
 Very strong team spirit and capable to work independently
 
 Candidate must hold a valid work permit or be eligible to work in the locations 
 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives. 
 
 Applications 
 Applications must include a CV, diploma(s) and a cover letter.

descriptionByLocale.it: Le attività di gestione dei rischi con il Gruppo sono supervisionate da Group Risk Management, guidato dal Group Head of Risk Management (“CRO”). I team di gestione del rischio situati in Svizzera sono incaricati di supervisionare le attività bancarie in Svizzera e di coordinare metodologie, implementare attività di rischio trasversale e progetti chiave con i rappresentanti della gestione del rischio locale a livello di Gruppo. In Svizzera, i team sono composti da Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team e Operational Risk Team, mentre un team di progetto fornisce un supporto trasversale a progetti o iniziative chiave guidate da CRO o Team Heads. In qualità di seconda linea di difesa, tutti i team forniscono consulenza a Business, partecipano ai comitati locali, svolgono controlli, sfida e supportano le valutazioni dei rischi e i loro piani di risposta in coordinamento con i proprietari di rischio. A partire dal 1° settembre 2026, Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) sta offrendo una posizione permanente all'interno dei suoi team di Group Risk Management (2a linea di difesa) a Ginevra, a partire da un programma di formazione di 12 mesi che include interazioni regolari con altre funzioni della Banca e rappresentanti Legal Entity in tutto il Gruppo. Lo scopo è quello di acquisire competenze professionali mirate e l'esperienza pratica con un orientamento forte sulla gestione del rischio e, in secondo luogo, sulla gestione del progetto. Rotazioni Il programma consiste in quattro rotazioni di tre mesi tra i seguenti team: Gruppo Risk Management Project Team Wealth Management Team, 1a linea di difesa Risk Management Team, 2a linea di difesa (Lussemburgo) Bank’s Change Management Team (Progetti Trasversali), parte dei team di COO Gruppo Principali responsabilità Durante il programma, sotto la supervisione dei team manager nel loro ruolo di mentore, il Graduate è previsto per fornire supporto giornaliero su tutte le attività di team Suggerisci rischi e/o metodi di controllo miglioramenti. Eseguire le attività di controllo e il risultato attuale internamente. Partecipa a progetti, in collaborazione con team e Soggetto-Matter-Experts. Partecipare ed eseguire recensioni tematiche e formulare opportunità di miglioramento. Preparare la segnalazione a Senior Management. Durante il programma, avrete anche la possibilità di avviare una certificazione relativa al settore bancario e/o alla vostra funzione, per esempio il CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) o la CIA (Certified Internal Auditor), migliorando ulteriormente il vostro sviluppo professionale. Corso di laurea o master in finanza, gestione aziendale recentemente ottenuto da un'università o equivalente altamente riconosciuta. Esperienza professionale massima di 12 mesi. Buona comprensione del settore bancario / finanziario, interesse per il modello Private Banking e la sfida / regolamenti. Conoscenza delle attività di gestione del rischio e/o controllo un'aspettativa. Esperienza nella gestione del progetto un plus. Forte capacità analitiche, forti capacità di presentazione. Conoscenza eccellente degli strumenti Microsoft Office in particolare Excel, PowerPoint. Conoscenza nel potere BI un plus. Fluente in inglese e francese (minimo C1 in entrambi). Competenze specifiche Alta motivazione, attenzione ai dettagli, eccellenti capacità organizzative e forte attenzione alla scadenza Discrezione come un bisogno per avere Multi-tasking e soluzioni orientate Molto forte spirito di squadra e in grado di lavorare indipendentemente Il candidato deve tenere un valido permesso di lavoro o essere idoneo a lavorare nelle sedi Competenze fondamentali: Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsabilità - Compliance con regolamenti e direttive interne. Le domande devono includere un CV, un diploma o una lettera di presentazione.

During the program, you will also have the possibility to start a certification related to Banking sector and/or your function, for examples the CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) or CIA (Certified Internal Auditor), further enhancing your professional development. Knowledges Good understanding of banking / financial sector, interest for Private Banking model and challenge / regulations. Knowledge of risk management and/or control activities an expectation. Experience in project management a plus. Strong analytical skills, strong presentation skills. Technical Skills Excellent knowledge of the Microsoft Office tools especially Excel, PowerPoint. Knowledge in Power BI a plus. Fluent in English and French (minimum C1 in both). Specific Competencies High motivation, attention to details, excellent organization skills and strong attention to deadline Discretion as a need-to-have Multi-tasking and solutions oriented Very strong team spirit and capable to work independently Candidate must hold a valid work permit or be eligible to work in the locations Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives. Applications Applications must include a CV, diploma(s) and a cover letter.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Risikomanagement-Aktivitäten mit der Gruppe werden von Group Risk Management überwacht, geleitet von der Konzernleitung Risikomanagement („CRO“). Risikomanagement-Teams in der Schweiz sind dafür verantwortlich, die Aktivitäten der Bank in der Schweiz zu überwachen und Methoden zu koordinieren, transversale Risikoaktivitäten und Schlüsselprojekte mit lokalen Risikomanagement-Repräsentanten auf Konzernebene einzusetzen. In der Schweiz werden die Teams von Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team und Operational Risk Team komponiert, während ein Projektteam eine transversale Unterstützung für wichtige Projekte oder Initiativen von CRO oder Team Heads bietet. Als 2. Verteidigungslinie beraten Teams alle Unternehmen, beteiligen sich an lokalen Komitees, führen Kontrollen, Herausforderungen und unterstützen Risikobewertungen und ihre Reaktionspläne in Abstimmung mit Risikoinhabern. Mission Ab dem 1. September 2026 bietet Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) in Genf eine dauerhafte Position innerhalb seiner Teams des Konzerns Risk Management (2. Verteidigungslinie) an, beginnend mit einem 12-Monats-Trainingsprogramm, das regelmäßige Interaktionen mit anderen Bankfunktionen und Legal Entity-Vertretern im gesamten Konzern umfasst. Ziel ist es, gezielte berufliche Fähigkeiten sowie praktische Erfahrungen mit einer starken Ausrichtung auf das Risikomanagement und zweitens auf das Projektmanagement zu erwerben. Drehung Das Programm besteht aus vier drei Monaten Rotationen in den folgenden Teams: Group Risk Management Project Team Wealth Management Team, 1. Zeile des Verteidigungsrisikomanagement Teams, 2. Zeile der Verteidigung (Luxembourg) Bank Change Management Team (Transversal Projects), Teil der Gruppe COO Teams Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Während des Programms, unter der Aufsicht der Teammanager in ihrer Rolle des Mentors, wird der Graduate erwartet, dass sie Unterstützung für alle Teams Aktivitäten bieten. Risiko- und/oder Kontrollmethoden verbessern. Durchführung von Kontrolltätigkeiten und gegenwärtigen Ergebnissen intern. Erwarten Sie Projekte, in Zusammenarbeit mit Teams und Fachexperten. Erwarten und führen thematische Rezensionen und formulieren Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten. Melden Sie sich an Senior Management. Während des Programms haben Sie auch die Möglichkeit, eine Zertifizierung im Zusammenhang mit Banking Sektor und/oder Ihre Funktion zu starten, für Beispiele die CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) oder CIA (Certified Intern Auditor), die Ihre berufliche Entwicklung weiter zu verbessern. Ihr Profil Hintergrund Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Finanzen, Business-Management vor kurzem von einer anerkannten Universität oder gleichwertig. Maximale 12-monatige Berufserfahrung. Wissen Gutes Verständnis des Bank- / Finanzsektors, Interesse für Private Banking Modell und Herausforderung / Verordnungen. Kenntnisse des Risikomanagements und/oder der Steuerungsaktivitäten eine Erwartung. Erfahrung im Projektmanagement ein Plus. Starke analytische Fähigkeiten, starke Präsentationsfähigkeiten. Technische Fähigkeiten Ausgezeichnete Kenntnisse der Microsoft Office-Tools vor allem Excel, PowerPoint. Wissen in Power BI ein Plus. Fluent in Englisch und Französisch (mindestens C1 in beiden). Spezifische Kompetenzen Hohe Motivation, Aufmerksamkeit auf Details, ausgezeichnete organisatorische Fähigkeiten und starke Aufmerksamkeit auf die Frist Diskretion als bedarfsgerechte Multi-tasking und Lösungen orientiert Sehr starker Teamgeist und fähig, selbständig zu arbeiten Candidate muss eine gültige Arbeitserlaubnis halten oder in der Lage sein Kernkompetenzen zu arbeiten : Adherence to the company’s Values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with Regulations and intern Directives. Bewerbungen Bewerbungen müssen einen Lebenslauf, Diplome und einen Brief umfassen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Les activités de gestion des risques avec le Groupe sont supervisées par la Gestion des risques du Groupe, dirigée par le Chef du Groupe de la gestion des risques. Les équipes de gestion des risques situées en Suisse sont chargées de superviser les activités de la Banque en Suisse et de coordonner les méthodes, de déployer des activités de gestion des risques transversales et des projets clés avec les représentants locaux de la gestion des risques au niveau du Groupe. En Suisse, les équipes sont composées de Treasury and Trading Team, Asset Management Team, Wealth Management Team et Operational Risk Team, tandis qu'une équipe de projet fournit un soutien transversal sur des projets ou des initiatives clés menés par CRO ou Team Heads. En tant que deuxième ligne de défense, les équipes fournissent toutes des conseils aux entreprises, participent aux comités locaux, effectuent des contrôles, contestent et appuient les évaluations des risques et leurs plans d'intervention en coordination avec les propriétaires de risques. Mission À compter du 1er septembre 2026, l'Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) offre un poste permanent au sein de ses équipes de gestion des risques du Groupe (2e ligne de défense) à Genève, en commençant par un programme de formation de 12 mois comprenant des interactions régulières avec d'autres fonctions de la Banque et des représentants des entités juridiques dans l'ensemble du Groupe. L'objectif est d'acquérir des compétences professionnelles ciblées ainsi qu'une expérience pratique avec une forte orientation sur la gestion des risques et ensuite sur la gestion de projets. Rotations Le programme se compose de quatre rotations de trois mois entre les équipes suivantes : Équipe de gestion des risques de groupe Équipe de gestion des richesses, 1ère ligne d'équipe de gestion des risques de défense, 2e ligne de défense (Luxembourg) Équipe de gestion des changements (Projets transversaux), une partie des équipes de COO du groupe Principales responsabilités Au cours du programme, sous la supervision des gestionnaires d'équipe dans leur rôle de mentor, le diplômé est censé fournir un soutien à toutes les équipes et les aider dans leurs tâches quotidiennes, en particulier : Participer aux évaluations des risques et aux exercices d'évaluation du contrôle dans l'ensemble de la Banque / l'emplacement. Proposer des améliorations aux méthodes de contrôle et/ou de risque. Effectuer des activités de contrôle et présenter les résultats en interne. Participer à des projets, en collaboration avec des équipes et des experts-sujets. Participer et réaliser des examens thématiques et formuler des possibilités de renforcement. Préparer les rapports à la haute direction. Pendant le programme, vous aurez également la possibilité de commencer une certification liée au secteur bancaire et/ou à votre fonction, par exemple la FCA (Analyste financier Chartered) ou la CIA (Auditeur interne certifié), en améliorant votre perfectionnement professionnel. Votre profil Contexte Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en finance, gestion d'entreprise récemment obtenu d'une université hautement reconnue ou équivalent. Maximum 12 mois d'expérience professionnelle. Connaissances Bonne compréhension du secteur bancaire et financier, intérêt pour le modèle de la banque privée et défi / règlement. Connaissance des activités de gestion du risque et/ou de contrôle d'une attente. Expérience en gestion de projet a plus. De solides compétences analytiques, de solides compétences en présentation. Compétences techniques Excellente connaissance des outils Microsoft Office en particulier Excel, PowerPoint. Connaissance de la puissance BI a plus. Fluent en anglais et en français (minimum C1 dans les deux). Compétences spécifiques Motivation élevée, attention aux détails, excellentes compétences organisationnelles et forte attention à la date limite Discrétion en tant que nécessité de disposer de solutions multitâches et orientées Très fort esprit d'équipe et capable de travailler de façon indépendante Le candidat doit détenir un permis de travail valide ou être admissible à travailler sur les lieux Compétences de base : Adhérence à l'entreprise Valeurs : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes. Demandes Les demandes doivent comprendre un CV, un diplôme et une lettre de motivation.

jobs.title: Stock exchange / Settlement Officer
jobs.description:
TEMPORARY MISSION - 9 MONTHS 
 
 Mission : 
 

 Settlement of equities, bonds, structured products​ and investment funds transactions. 
 
 

 Main duties : 

 Monitoring of pending transactions. 

 Control and monitoring positions. 

 Contact with traders, custodians and counterparties. 

 Respect the process and its implementation in relation to operational requirements and volumes as directed by the bank. 
 
 

 Core competencies : 
 
 • Think in "Problem-Action-Results" terms 
 • Show strong client service ethic 
 • Be proactive and driven 
 • Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way 
 • Be a continuous learner 
 • Adopt change with a positive attitude 
 • Consistently comply with internal & external regulations 
 • Go beyond specific assignments, walk the extra mile 
 • Seek opportunities to improve the existing 
 • Be open to other's idea's 
 • Balance personal and team interests 
 • Seek opportunities to improve quality in all features of the work environment 
 • Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures 

 
 Specific Competencies : 

 The complete flow of a transaction 

 The parties involved on the market (counterparties, custodians, clearing, companies) 

 Financial instruments (equities, bonds, structured products, investment funds) 

 Good management priorities and ability to deal with sensitive situations 

 
 Other Skills/Abilities : 

 CFC bank or equivalent 

 Ability to work within a team 

 French/English 

 MS Office / banking software / Swift 

 Knowledge of Omgeo and Euclid is a plus 

 
 Others : 
 Swiss Residence 
 

 Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives

descriptionByLocale.it: MISSIONE TEMPORARIA - 9 MESE Missione: Settlement of equities, bonds, prodotti strutturati e operazioni di fondi di investimento. Dazi principali: sorveglianza delle operazioni in sospeso. Posizione di controllo e monitoraggio. Contatto con commercianti, custodi e controparti. Rispettare il processo e la sua attuazione in relazione ai requisiti operativi e ai volumi diretti dalla banca. Competenze principali: • Pensare in termini "Problem-Action-Results" • Mostrare etica del servizio client forte • Essere proattivi e guidati • opinioni e critiche espressi in modo costruttivo • Sii un apprendista continuo • Adottare un cambiamento con un atteggiamento positivo • Coerentemente rispettare le normative interne ed esterne • Andare oltre incarichi specifici, camminare il miglio supplementare • Cercare opportunità per migliorare l'esistente • • Equilibrare gli interessi personali e di squadra dell'altra idea • Cercare opportunità per migliorare la qualità in tutte le caratteristiche dell'ambiente di lavoro • Mantenere gli standard di qualità nonostante le pressioni dei programmi Competenze specifiche: Il flusso completo di una transazione Le parti interessate sul mercato (controparti, custodi, liquidazione, società) Strumenti finanziari (equità, obbligazioni, prodotti strutturati, fondi di investimento) Buone priorità di gestione e capacità di affrontare situazioni sensibili Altre competenze/abilità: CFC banca o equivalente Capacità di lavorare all'interno di un team francese/inglese MS Office / software bancario / Swift Conoscenza di Omgeo e Euclid è un plus Altro: Swiss Residence Core Competenza: Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility e Responsibility - Competenza con regolamenti e direttive interne

descriptionByLocale.de: TEMPORARY MISSION - 9 MONTHS Mission: Abwicklung von Aktien, Anleihen, strukturierten Produkten und Investmentfondstransaktionen. Wichtigste Aufgaben : Überwachung der anhängigen Transaktionen. Kontroll- und Überwachungspositionen. Kontakt mit Händlern, Kunden und Gegenparteien. Überprüfen Sie den Prozess und seine Umsetzung in Bezug auf die operativen Anforderungen und Mengen, wie von der Bank gerichtet. Kernkompetenzen : • Denken Sie an "Problem-Action-Results" Begriffe • Starke Kundendienstethik anzeigen • Proaktiv und getrieben werden • Express Meinungen und Kritik konstruktiv • Seien Sie ein kontinuierlicher Lernender • Adopt Änderung mit einer positiven Einstellung • Konsequent Einhaltung interner und externer Vorschriften • Gehen Sie über bestimmte Aufgaben hinaus, gehen Sie die zusätzliche Meile • Sehen Sie Möglichkeiten, um die vorhandenen zu verbessern • Sie sind offen für andere Ideen • Balance persönliche und Teaminteressen • Sehen Sie Möglichkeiten, um Qualität in allen Funktionen des Arbeitsumfelds zu verbessern • Qualitätsstandards trotz Zeitplan Drücke Spezifische Kompetenzen zu halten: Der vollständige Ablauf einer Transaktion Finanzinstrumente (Equities, Anleihen, strukturierte Produkte, Investmentfonds) Gute Managementprioritäten und die Fähigkeit, mit sensiblen Situationen zu umgehen Andere Fähigkeiten / Fähigkeiten : CFC-Bank oder gleichwertige Fähigkeit, innerhalb eines Teams Französisch / Englisch MS Office / Banksoftware / Swift Knowledge of Omgeo und Euclid zu arbeiten ist ein Plus Andere: Swiss Residence Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s value: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance mit Vorschriften und internen Richtlinien
descriptionByLocale.fr: MISSION TEMPORAIRE - 9 MOIS Mission : Règlement des opérations d'actions, d'obligations, de produits structurés et de fonds d'investissement. Principales fonctions : Contrôle des opérations en cours. Positions de contrôle et de surveillance. Contact avec les négociants, les dépositaires et les contreparties. Respecter le processus et sa mise en oeuvre par rapport aux besoins opérationnels et aux volumes prescrits par la banque. Compétences de base : • Penser en termes de "problème-Action-Résultats" • Montrer une éthique forte du service à la clientèle • Être proactif et motivé • Exprimer des opinions et des critiques de manière constructive • Être un apprenant continu • Adopter un changement avec une attitude positive • Respecter en permanence les règlements internes et externes • Aller au-delà des missions spécifiques, marcher le mille supplémentaire • Chercher des occasions d'améliorer l'existant • Être ouvert à l'idée d'autrui • Équilibrer les intérêts personnels et les intérêts de l'équipe • Chercher des occasions d'améliorer la qualité dans toutes les caractéristiques de l'environnement de travail • Maintenir des normes de qualité malgré les pressions du calendrier Compétences spécifiques : le flux complet d'une transaction Les parties concernées sur le marché (contreparties, dépositaires, compensation, sociétés) Instruments financiers (équités, obligations, produits structurés, fonds d'investissement) Bonnes priorités de gestion et capacité à faire face à des situations sensibles Autres compétences/capacités : CFC banque ou équivalent Capacité à travailler au sein d'une équipe Français/Anglais MS Office / logiciel bancaire / Swift Connaissance d'Omgeo et d'Euclid est un plus Autres : Swiss Residence Core Compétences : Adhérence à l'entreprise Valeurs : Dédicace, Conviction, Agilité et Responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes

jobs.title: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract

titleByLocale.it: Funzionario del servizio clienti istituzionale (M/F) - Contratto temporaneo di 12 mesi
titleByLocale.en: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract
titleByLocale.de: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract
titleByLocale.fr: Institutional Client Service Officer (M/F) - 12 Months Temporary Contract

jobs.description:
Mission 
 Through the Asset Management division, we offer to institutional clients’ investment management capabilities organised across the business lines Long-Only Platform, Alternative Investment Solutions, Private Markets Group, Partnerships, Asset Allocation & DPM. 
 The Institutional Client Service Team serves as the primary contact for large and complex institutional clients globally, supporting sales teams in engaging institutional and wholesale clients. The team plays a vital role in enhancing profitability and driving growth within the Asset Management business. 
 We are seeking a dynamic candidate with a strong interest in Asset Management to join the Institutional Client Service team in Frankfurt . This role involves close collaboration with the German sales team, reporting locally to the Head of Wholesale EMEA and centrally to the COO - Institutional Clients & Head of the Client Service Team. The position covers activities with both institutional and wholesale clients in the DACH region (Germany, German-speaking Switzerland, and Austria) This position is for 12 months, but it may be renewed or offer other opportunities. 
 
 Main responsibilities 
 Assist Asset Management Sales teams in supporting German-speaking client-base. 

 Manage, execute, and follow up on client requests and inquiries. 

 Collaborate with internal teams throughout the client lifecycle to ensure client satisfaction and retention. 

 Coordinate the onboarding process and oversee the end-to-end transition. 

 Involve in the implementation and monitoring of the local sales strategy. 

 Support the team in their prospecting initiatives, including the preparation of marketing materials and conducting market research. 

 Contribute to the optimization of processes through the application of AI technologies. 

 Act as the local CRM champion, supporting and training the sales team to meet Salesforce requirements and ensure data accuracy. 

 Organise local events and roadshows. 

 Perform office management tasks. 

 
 Your Profile 
 Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Marketing, or a related field is beneficial. 

 Excellent organizational skills and capability to work independently. 

 Accuracy and attention to detail. 

 Advanced skills in standard IT applications (MS Office). 

 Mother tongue German and fluency in English is a “MUST”; French is a “nice to have”. 

 
 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. 
 By joining UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A. you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. 
 UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. 
 In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.

This role involves close collaboration with the German sales team, reporting locally to the Head of Wholesale EMEA and centrally to the COO - Institutional Clients & Head of the Client Service Team. The position covers activities with both institutional and wholesale clients in the DACH region (Germany, German-speaking Switzerland, and Austria) This position is for 12 months, but it may be renewed or offer other opportunities. Main responsibilities Assist Asset Management Sales teams in supporting German-speaking client-base. Manage, execute, and follow up on client requests and inquiries. Collaborate with internal teams throughout the client lifecycle to ensure client satisfaction and retention. Coordinate the onboarding process and oversee the end-to-end transition. Involve in the implementation and monitoring of the local sales strategy. Support the team in their prospecting initiatives, including the preparation of marketing materials and conducting market research. Contribute to the optimization of processes through the application of AI technologies. Act as the local CRM champion, supporting and training the sales team to meet Salesforce requirements and ensure data accuracy. Organise local events and roadshows. Perform office management tasks. Your Profile Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Marketing, or a related field is beneficial. Excellent organizational skills and capability to work independently. Accuracy and attention to detail. Advanced skills in standard IT applications (MS Office). Mother tongue German and fluency in English is a “MUST”; French is a “nice to have”. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. By joining UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A. you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. UBP Asset Management (Europe) S.A encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Client Documentation Specialist

titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste de la documentation auprès des clients

jobs.description:
Mission 
 
 As part of the Client Documentation team, the Client Documentation Specialist is a key element to ensure:
 A smooth documents process flow between the different departments of the bank, especially regarding change in circumstances 
 The quality, coherence and the accuracy of the client's data in the bank's systems 
 The relevance of clients' instructions by performing control signature
 An efficient support to the other departments of the bank and the branches
 

 Main responsibilities 
 
 Day to day business 
 
 Review the documentation received from the clients for certain change in circumstances on an existing account or an account closing and verify that it complies with the local and international regulations (e.g. CDB20, Common Reporting Standards (CRS) and FATCA/QI rules) and the Bank's directives and procedures from (i) a formal point of view (e.g. the correct version of the document is signed, all the required fields have been completed) and (ii) that the information is consistent across the documents provided by the clients (IDs, corporate documents, bank's forms, etc…)
 Verify that the information entered in the Bank's systems by the Wealth Management is complete according to the documentation signed
 Perform 4 eyes controls and regular internal controls to ensure respect of the procedures 
 Ensure a good quality of service by providing accurate feedback to the Wealth Management on any error, missing document and answering in a timely manner to any query related to his/her mission and duties
 
 Coordination and central point of contact 
 Build a bridge and create synergy within the Client Documentation team and other key players (Legal, Compliance, IT…), create/maintain an efficient flow of communication that ensures all remain aware of important information and that it is consistent
 Act as a business partner by bringing his/her expertise and the relevant support and input to the other departments of the bank (Wealth Management, Compliance, Legal…) when required (on a complex situation, on the implementation of new regulations or bank's decisions, new projects)
 Coordinate efforts to help a smooth flow in the processes and always seek for improvements
 Facilitate problem solving and collaboration
 Create an environment oriented to trust, open communication and cohesive team effort
 
 Projects and Change management 
 Be up to date on any changes in the regulations, perform the assessment for internal changes, communicate with the relevant departments involved and to the team, implement them or launch projects, requests to IT as needed
 Participate in any project impacting the team, either required by a new regulation or initiated by the Bank, hence participate to workshops, meetings, upon the management delegation (for defining the business requirements, performing the testings, and any other required tasks)
 Involve the other team members as required
 Participate in the change management within the team by communicating proactively on the various projects and accompany the team in the change 
 Make sure that the procedures and processes are updated accordingly and communicated to all stakeholders, including the Client Documentation teams within the different branches.
 
 
 Your Profile 
 

 Education: Bachelors Degree
 Experience Technical skills: At ease with Microsoft tools, especially Excel
 Languages: English is a requirement, German/Italian or other language is a plus 
 Personal skills : Client service oriented, Curiosity and good interpersonal skills
 Swiss Residence mandatory 
 
 Core Competencies : 
 Open mind and team orientation: Be open to other's ideas. / Balance personal & team interests. / Express opinion and criticism in a constructive way.
 Innovation and development: Seek opportunities to improve the existing. / Be a continuous learner. / Adopt change with a positive attitude.
 Professional business culture: Think in 'Problem-Action-Results' terms. / Walk the extra mile. / Be proactive and driven. / Show strong client service ethic. / Build lasting client relationships.
 Quality, internal & external regulations: Consistently comply with internal & external regulations. / Seek opportunities to improve quality in all features of the work environment.
 Analytical Ability : Ability to assimilate procedures and to implement them. / Ability to identify issues and raise them in a structured way. / Ability to make process improvements. / Attention to detail.
 Solid organization and time management skills: Ability to organize the tasks efficiently based on priorities with anticipation of events. / Reaction and decision-making ability in face of unforeseen circumstances.
 Communication: Ability to raise issues via the right channel and in a constructive way. / Ability to expose constraints and opportunities. / Express opinions and criticism in a constructive way.
 Adaptability: Ability to change, be flexible. / Maintain quality standards despite schedule pressures.
 Team Spirit : Ability to proactively help the others. / Ability to finalize the common goal.

Verificare che le informazioni inserite nei sistemi della Banca da parte della Wealth Management siano complete secondo la documentazione firmata Perform 4 controlli degli occhi e controlli interni regolari per garantire il rispetto delle procedure Assicurare una buona qualità del servizio, fornendo un feedback accurato alla Wealth Management su qualsiasi errore, documento mancante e rispondendo in modo tempestivo a qualsiasi domanda relativa alla sua missione e ai suoi doveri Coordinamento e punto centrale di contatto Coordinare gli sforzi per aiutare un flusso regolare nei processi e cercare sempre miglioramenti Facilitate problem solving e collaborazione Creare un ambiente orientato alla fiducia, alla comunicazione aperta e allo sforzo di squadra coesivo Progetti e gestione dei cambiamenti Sii aggiornato su qualsiasi cambiamento delle normative, eseguire la valutazione per i cambiamenti interni, comunicare con i servizi interessati e per il team, implementarli o lanciare progetti, le richieste a IT come necessario Partecipare a qualsiasi progetto che colpisca il team, Coinvolgere gli altri membri del team come richiesto Partecipare alla gestione dei cambiamenti all'interno del team comunicando in modo proattivo sui vari progetti e accompagnando il team nella modifica Assicurarsi che le procedure e i processi siano aggiornati di conseguenza e comunicati a tutti gli stakeholder, compresi i team di Documentazione clienti all'interno dei diversi rami. Il tuo profilo Istruzione: Bachelors Degree Experience Capacità tecniche: A proprio agio con gli strumenti Microsoft, in particolare Excel Lingue: l'inglese è un requisito, il tedesco/italiano o altra lingua è un plus competenze personali: Servizio clienti orientato, Curiosità e buone abilità interpersonali Swiss Residence obbligatori Competenza core: mentalità aperta e orientamento del team: Sii aperto alle idee altrui. / Equilibrio interessi personali e di squadra. / esprimere l'opinione e la critica in modo costruttivo. Innovazione e sviluppo: cercate opportunità per migliorare l'esistente. / Sii un continuo apprendista. / Adottare il cambiamento con un atteggiamento positivo. Cultura aziendale professionale: Pensa in termini 'Problem-Action-Results'. / Camminare il miglio in più. / Sii proattivo e guidato. / Mostra forte servizio client etico. / Costruire relazioni cliente durature. Qualità, normative interne ed esterne: conforme alle normative interne ed esterne. / Cercate opportunità per migliorare la qualità in tutte le caratteristiche dell'ambiente di lavoro. Potere analitico: Capacità di assimilare le procedure e di attuarle. / Capacità di identificare i problemi e sollevarli in modo strutturato. / Capacità di migliorare il processo. / Attenzione ai dettagli. Solida capacità di organizzazione e gestione del tempo: capacità di organizzare i compiti in modo efficiente basato sulle priorità con l'anticipazione degli eventi. / Reazione e capacità decisionale di fronte a circostanze impreviste. Comunicazione: Capacità di sollevare problemi attraverso il canale giusto e in modo costruttivo. / Capacità di esporre vincoli e opportunità. / esprimere opinioni e critiche in modo costruttivo. Adattabilità: Capacità di cambiare, essere flessibile. / Mantenere standard di qualità nonostante le pressioni di programma. Spirito di squadra: Capacità di aiutare proattivamente gli altri. / Capacità di finalizzare l'obiettivo comune.
