jobs.title: Business Monitoring & Control Officer (M/F)

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile del Monitoraggio e Controllo Aziendale (M/F)
titleByLocale.fr: Agent de surveillance et de contrôle des activités (M/F)

jobs.description:
MISSION AND MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES : 
 The general role of Business Monitoring & Control (BMC) is to ensure that the operations in place are as effective and efficient as possible. This can involve reviewing the processes in place and assessing to determine possible ways of their improvement. 
 As a Business Monitoring & Control Officer (BMC), you will be responsible for implementing and maintaining robust control measures across various business functions. Your expertise will be instrumental in mitigating risks, ensuring compliance with regulations, and driving continuous improvement. You will collaborate closely with different departments, offering valuable insights and recommendations to enhance overall business performance and maintain our reputation as a trusted financial services provider. 
 BMC-officers consider in their work how to ensure that the business operates in a way that meets the needs of their customers effectively and in line with the governance of the Bank. They will control if the 1st line of defense duties has been correctly performed and will report on regular basis to the 2nd line of defense. 
 They form the link between the relationship managers (RMs) and the governing bodies (e.g., Management Committee and Board of Directors) and other units. 
 A BMC-officer will carry out administrative and accounting duties by organizing and coordinating banking services. 
 
 YOUR PROFILE : 
 Education: 
 Master’s degree in finance, banking or economics, or equivalent experience. 
 Experience : 
 3-5 years’ experience in a wealth management institution in operational monitoring and controls. 
 Technical Skills: 
 Good knowledge of regulatory compliance and MiFID. 
 Fluent in English and French, additional languages are an advantage. 
 Advanced user of MS Office Pack and main financial software products. 
 Personal skills: 
 Business-oriented and solution-driven mindset, proactive with extreme confidentiality. 

 Analytical mindset, deep rigorousness, risk awareness, and attention to detail. 

 Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple deadlines, and collaborate cross-functionally in a multicultural environment. 

 Strong communication skills, solid team spirit. 

 Being proactive and reactive, resilient to stress. 

 Sense of discretion and confidentiality, adherence to the company’s values. 
 
 
 Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. 
 By joining Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. in Luxembourg you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. 
 Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. 
 In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.

descriptionByLocale.it: MISSION E MAIN RESPONSABILITÀ: Il ruolo generale del monitoraggio e del controllo delle imprese (BMC) è quello di garantire che le operazioni in atto siano il più efficace ed efficiente possibile. Ciò può comportare la revisione dei processi in atto e la valutazione per determinare i modi possibili del loro miglioramento. In qualità di Business Monitoring & Control Officer (BMC), sarai responsabile dell'implementazione e del mantenimento di misure di controllo robuste in diverse funzioni aziendali. La vostra esperienza sarà fondamentale per mitigare i rischi, garantire la conformità alle normative e migliorare continuamente. Potrai collaborare a stretto contatto con diversi dipartimenti, offrendo preziose informazioni e raccomandazioni per migliorare le prestazioni aziendali globali e mantenere la nostra reputazione come fornitore di servizi finanziari di fiducia. BMC-ufficiali considerano nel loro lavoro come garantire che l'azienda opera in modo che soddisfi le esigenze dei propri clienti in modo efficace e in linea con la governance della Banca. Essi controlleranno se la prima linea di compiti di difesa è stata eseguita correttamente e riferirà regolarmente alla seconda linea di difesa. Essi formano il legame tra i responsabili delle relazioni (RM) e gli organi di governo (ad esempio, Comitato di gestione e Consiglio di amministrazione) e altre unità. Un BMC-ufficiale svolgerà compiti amministrativi e contabili organizzando e coordinando i servizi bancari. TUO PROFILE: Istruzione: Laurea magistrale in finanza, bancario o economia, o esperienza equivalente. Esperienza: 3-5 anni di esperienza in un istituto di gestione della ricchezza nel monitoraggio e nei controlli operativi. Competenze tecniche: Buona conoscenza della conformità normativa e MiFID. Fluente in inglese e francese, lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. L'utente avanzato di MS Office Pack e principali prodotti software finanziari. Competenze personali: mentalità orientata al business e orientata alla soluzione, proattiva con estrema riservatezza. Mindset analitico, profonda rigorositÃ, consapevolezza del rischio e attenzione ai dettagli. Possibilità di priorizzare le attività, gestire più scadenze e collaborare in modo trasversale in un ambiente multiculturale. Forte capacità di comunicazione, spirito di squadra solido. Essendo proattivo e reattivo, resiliente allo stress. Senso di discrezione e riservatezza, aderenza ai valori dell’azienda. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) è una società a conduzione familiare, guidata da una visione imprenditoriale, innovazione e indipendenza. UBP è una delle banche private più fortemente capitalizzate. Unendo Union Bancaire Privée (Europa) S.A. in Lussemburgo si abbraccia un team di professionisti altamente qualificati di supporto in Private Banking che vi porterà a sviluppare la vostra carriera al livello superiore. Incoraggiamo l'apprendimento continuo, lo sviluppo e la condivisione delle conoscenze. Adottiamo una cultura di Agility, Convizione, Dedicazione e alto grado di Responsabilità. Union Bancaire Privée (Europa) S.A. incoraggia tutti i candidati qualificati e idonei ad applicare indipendentemente dalla loro identità di genere o espressione, età, sfondo razziale, etnico e culturale, religione e credenze, orientamento sessuale, disabilità o neurodiversità. Ai sensi delle disposizioni della legge lussemburghese del 23 luglio 2016 che modifica la legge del 29 marzo 2013, il candidato conservato sarà tenuto a fornire un estratto dal loro registro penale come parte del processo di screening UBP.

A BMC-officer will carry out administrative and accounting duties by organizing and coordinating banking services. YOUR PROFILE : Education: Master’s degree in finance, banking or economics, or equivalent experience. Experience : 3-5 years’ experience in a wealth management institution in operational monitoring and controls. Technical Skills: Good knowledge of regulatory compliance and MiFID. Fluent in English and French, additional languages are an advantage. Advanced user of MS Office Pack and main financial software products. Personal skills: Business-oriented and solution-driven mindset, proactive with extreme confidentiality. Analytical mindset, deep rigorousness, risk awareness, and attention to detail. Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple deadlines, and collaborate cross-functionally in a multicultural environment. Strong communication skills, solid team spirit. Being proactive and reactive, resilient to stress. Sense of discretion and confidentiality, adherence to the company’s values. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) is a family-owned company, driven by an entrepreneurial vision, innovation and independence. UBP is one of the most strongly-capitalised private banks. By joining Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. in Luxembourg you will embrace a team of supportive high qualified professionals in Private Banking that will lead you to develop your career to the top level. We encourage continuous learning, development and knowledge sharing. We foster a culture of Agility, Conviction, Dedication and high degree of Responsibility. Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. encourages all suitable qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity or expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity. In accordance with the provisions of the Luxembourg law of 23 July 2016 amending the law of 29 March 2013, retained candidate will be required to provide an extract from their criminal record as a part of UBP screening process.
descriptionByLocale.de: MISSION UND MAIN RESPONSIBILITÄTEN : Die allgemeine Rolle von Business Monitoring & Control (BMC) besteht darin, sicherzustellen, dass die laufenden Operationen so effektiv und effizient wie möglich sind. Dabei kann es sich um eine Überprüfung der anstehenden Prozesse und eine Bewertung der möglichen Verbesserungsmethoden handeln. Als Business Monitoring & Control Officer (BMC) sind Sie für die Umsetzung und Aufrechterhaltung robuster Kontrollmaßnahmen in verschiedenen Geschäftsfunktionen verantwortlich. Ihr Know-how wird entscheidend sein, um Risiken zu mindern, die Einhaltung von Vorschriften zu gewährleisten und eine kontinuierliche Verbesserung zu erreichen. Sie arbeiten eng mit verschiedenen Abteilungen zusammen und bieten wertvolle Einblicke und Empfehlungen, um die allgemeine Geschäftsleistung zu verbessern und unseren Ruf als vertrauenswürdiger Finanzdienstleister zu erhalten. BMC-Angebote betrachten in ihrer Arbeit, wie sicherzustellen, dass das Unternehmen in einer Weise arbeitet, die den Bedürfnissen ihrer Kunden effektiv und im Einklang mit der Governance der Bank entspricht. Sie werden kontrollieren, ob die 1. Zeile der Verteidigungspflichten korrekt ausgeführt worden ist und regelmäßig der 2. Verteidigungslinie melden wird. Sie bilden die Verbindung zwischen den Beziehungsmanagern (RMs) und den Leitungsgremien (z.B. Vorstand und Verwaltungsrat) und anderen Einheiten. Ein BMC-Angebot wird Verwaltungs- und Rechnungswesen durch die Organisation und Koordination von Bankdienstleistungen durchführen. IHRE PROFILE : Ausbildung: Master-Abschluss in Finanzen, Bankwesen oder Wirtschaft oder gleichwertige Erfahrung. Erfahrung: 3-5 Jahre Erfahrung in einer Vermögensverwaltungseinrichtung bei der operativen Überwachung und Kontrolle. Technische Fähigkeiten: Gute Kenntnisse der regulatorischen Compliance und MiFID. Fluent in Englisch und Französisch, zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Vorteil. Erweiterter Benutzer von MS Office Pack und wichtigsten Finanzsoftware-Produkten. Persönliche Fähigkeiten: Business-orientiertes und lösungsorientiertes Mindset, proaktiv mit extremer Vertraulichkeit. Analytische Denkweise, tiefe Strenge, Risikobewusstsein und Liebe zum Detail. Fähigkeit, Aufgaben zu priorisieren, mehrere Fristen zu verwalten und interfunktionell in einer multikulturellen Umgebung zusammenzuarbeiten. Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, solider Teamgeist. Proaktiv und reaktionsfähig, belastbar. Sinn für Diskretion und Vertraulichkeit, Einhaltung der Werte des Unternehmens. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) ist ein Familienunternehmen, das von einer unternehmerischen Vision, Innovation und Unabhängigkeit angetrieben wird. UBP ist eine der am stärkstenkapitalisierten Privatbanken. Durch den Beitritt zu Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. in Luxemburg werden Sie ein Team von unterstützenden hochqualifizierten Fachleuten in Private Banking, die Sie dazu führen, Ihre Karriere auf das höchste Niveau zu entwickeln. Wir fördern ständiges Lernen, Entwicklung und Wissensaustausch. Wir fördern eine Kultur von Agilität, Konviktion, Hingabe und hohe Verantwortung. Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. ermutigt alle geeigneten qualifizierten und förderfähigen Kandidaten, unabhängig von ihrer Geschlechtsidentität oder Ausdruck, Alter, Rasse, ethnischen und kulturellen Hintergrund, Religion und Überzeugungen, sexuelle Orientierung, Behinderung oder Neurodiversität anzuwenden. Gemäß den Bestimmungen des luxemburgischen Gesetzes vom 23. Juli 2016 zur Änderung des Gesetzes vom 29. März 2013 ist ein fester Bewerber erforderlich, um einen Auszug aus seinem Strafregister als Teil des UBP-Screening-Prozesses bereitzustellen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: MISSION ET PRINCIPALES RESPONSABILITÉS : Le rôle général de la surveillance et du contrôle des entreprises (BMC) est de veiller à ce que les opérations en place soient aussi efficaces et efficientes que possible. Il peut s'agir d'examiner les processus en place et d'évaluer les moyens possibles d'améliorer ces processus. En tant qu'agent de surveillance et de contrôle des activités (BMC), vous serez responsable de la mise en oeuvre et du maintien de mesures de contrôle solides pour diverses fonctions opérationnelles. Votre expertise jouera un rôle déterminant dans l'atténuation des risques, l'observation des règlements et l'amélioration continue. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec différents ministères, en offrant des conseils et des recommandations utiles pour améliorer la performance globale de l'entreprise et maintenir notre réputation de fournisseur de services financiers fiable. Les agents de BMC examinent dans leur travail comment s'assurer que l'entreprise fonctionne de manière à répondre aux besoins de leurs clients de manière efficace et conforme à la gouvernance de la Banque. Ils contrôleront si la première ligne de fonctions de défense a été correctement effectuée et se présenteront régulièrement à la deuxième ligne de défense. Ils constituent le lien entre les gestionnaires de relations (GR) et les organes directeurs (par exemple, le comité de gestion et le conseil d'administration) et d'autres unités. Un agent du BMC exercera des fonctions administratives et comptables en organisant et en coordonnant les services bancaires. VOTRE PROFIL : Formation : Maîtrise en finance, banque ou économie, ou expérience équivalente. Expérience : 3-5 ans d'expérience dans une institution de gestion de patrimoine dans le contrôle opérationnel. Compétences techniques : Bonne connaissance de la conformité réglementaire et du MiFID. Fluent en anglais et en français, d'autres langues sont un avantage. Utilisateur avancé de MS Office Pack et des principaux logiciels financiers. Compétences personnelles : esprit orienté vers l'entreprise et orienté vers la solution, proactif avec une confidentialité extrême. L'état d'esprit analytique, la rigueur profonde, la sensibilisation aux risques et l'attention aux détails. Capacité de prioriser les tâches, de gérer plusieurs échéances et de collaborer de façon interfonctionnelle dans un environnement multiculturel. Forte capacité de communication, solide esprit d'équipe. Être proactif et réactif, résistant au stress. Sens de discrétion et de confidentialité, respect des valeurs de l'entreprise. Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) est une entreprise familiale, animée par une vision entrepreneuriale, l'innovation et l'indépendance. UBP est l'une des banques privées les plus fortement capitalisées. En rejoignant l'Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. au Luxembourg, vous allez embrasser une équipe de professionnels hautement qualifiés en Private Banking qui vous mènera à développer votre carrière au plus haut niveau. Nous encourageons l'apprentissage continu, le développement et le partage des connaissances. Nous favorisons une culture de l'agilité, de la condamnation, de la dédicace et du haut degré de responsabilité. Union Bancaire Privée (Europe) S.A. encourage tous les candidats qualifiés et éligibles à postuler indépendamment de leur identité ou expression de genre, de leur âge, de leur origine raciale, ethnique et culturelle, de leur religion et de leurs croyances, de leur orientation sexuelle, de leur handicap ou de leur neurodiversité. Conformément aux dispositions de la loi luxembourgeoise du 23 juillet 2016 modifiant la loi du 29 mars 2013, le candidat retenu sera tenu de fournir un extrait de son casier judiciaire dans le cadre du processus de contrôle UBP.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API

jobs.title: Business Monitoring Officer

descriptionByLocale.it: Main Responsibilities Business Risk – Assist with implementing the Bank’s Suitability Framework, creating the relevant procedures and guides, providing training on documents and systems relevant to suitability and guiding the Front Office on best practices. Business Monitoring – Assist with implementing procedures and control solutions and monitoring business activities to ensure compliant Front Office & Client Documentation staff and activities, providing assurance on the quality of the controls and tasks performed. Conducting investigations in relation to procedural and control issues and leading associated remediation activity. Role Duties Key Accountabilities General : Maintain a Group-wide and ‘team’ perspective in project leadership and business support activities, balancing commercial and control requirements whilst recognising location differences where they need to be applied; Comply with external regulatory and internal policy requirements, including the Bank’s global and regional Directives, Policies, Operating Procedures and controls to meet the Bank’s local regulatory requirements and to protect the business from financial, regulatory and reputational risk; Quality Assurance, Monitoring and Oversight : Monitor Private Banking and Client Documentation processes and activities, seeking continuous improvement and assuring quality; Perform assurance testing on key aspects of risk and controls; Review / Monitor defined activities in conjunction with Risk / Compliance; Monitor Private Banking and Client Documentation rectification of document deficiencies or completion of remediation project work; Assist with completing the Team’s Management & Functional Controls; Review and approve, where appropriate, exceptions to processes and re-tagging of clients; Procedures & Controls Implementation: Assist with reviewing and agreeing local Directives and Policies; Review and implement User Guides and Key Operating Procedures for key Front Office and Client Documentation processes; Assist with implementing and reviewing the Management & Functional Controls (MFCs) for the London Private Banking business; Agree specifications and provide support for testing and sign off for implementation of PB Portal / other systems enhancements; Provide input to, or represent, Private Banking in operational / regulatory initiatives or projects; Collaborate with support functions (e.g. Risk, Operations) on compliance, loss prevention and workplace efficiency; Find and implement solutions for ad-hoc queries from Private Banking staff. Audits / Investigations and Remediation: Investigate and report on operational issues / errors and ensure client complaints are escalated; Provide monthly management information for specified risk items to Risk for presentation at the London Compliance & Risk Committee / Management Committee for management oversight and review with relevant stakeholders; Assist with the production of client data lists, and analysis in response to audit comments and audit points; Assist with the remediation of any open audit points to closure; Follow up on risk issues logged in the risk database owned by Private Banking. Training : Support the development of training guides on key business processes to assist in improving knowledge and reducing operational errors; Contribute to / deliver relevant regulatory / internal training to ensure competent and compliant staff and activities; Deliver relevant induction training for all new staff within Wealth Management. The job description is not exhaustive and may include other duties as assigned from time to time by Line Manager and Management. Committee Membership None Conduct Rules This role is required to comply with the Financial Conduct Authority’s (FCA) Individual Conduct Rules, which are: To act with integrity; To act with due skill, care and diligence; To be open and cooperative with the FCA, the Prudential Regulation Authoritity (PRA) and other regulators; To pay due regard to the interests of customers and treat them fairly; To observe proper standards of market conduct; and To act to deliver good outcomes for retail customers. Person Specification Knowledge, Skills & Experience Qualifications: Completion of UBP Annual Compliance training programme Critical Competencies: skills and abilities required for the role: Strong understanding of UBP systems and procedures, Strong understanding of risk management principles and tools; Strong understanding of local regulatory requirements; Strong understanding of business processes and associated controls within financial institutions, preferably within Private Banking; Strong organisational and attention to detail skills, with the ability to handle multiple tasks and meet deadlines; Strong communication, stakeholder engagement and relationship building skills with key stakeholders; Strong analytical and problem solving skills; Strong management and project management / co-ordination skills; Strong understanding of Microsoft Office Applications, in particular Excel. Competencies and Values Required

jobs.title: Compliance Officer Transaction Monitoring - Temporary 6 months

titleByLocale.it: Compliance Officer Transaction Monitoring - Temporary 6 mesi
titleByLocale.en: Compliance Officer Transaction Monitoring - Temporary 6 months
titleByLocale.de: Compliance Officer Transaction Monitoring - Temporäre 6 Monate
titleByLocale.fr: Agent de conformité Surveillance des transactions - temporaire 6 mois

descriptionByLocale.it: Assicurare il rilevamento e il monitoraggio delle transazioni ad alto rischio in una prospettiva AML e in materia di leggi e regolamenti applicabili, nonché di politiche e procedure interne. Eseguire altri controlli di conformità e compiti di monitoraggio. ## Mansioni - Eseguire il secondo livello di controllo sugli avvisi ad alto rischio generati dal sistema di monitoraggio delle transazioni per identificare attività sospette e potenziali rischi per la criminalità finanziaria; - Valutare la completezza e l'accuratezza delle spiegazioni RM sugli avvisi AML e analizzare la plausibilità delle informazioni e della documentazione di supporto sul file; - Eseguire ulteriori chiarimenti e indagini sui pagamenti sospettivi o modelli; ## Requisiti - Laurea in Giurisprudenza, Economia, Finanza, Business Administration o equivalente. - Un’esperienza minima di 2 anni come Compliance, KYC e AML in Private Banking o un ruolo simile; - conoscenza approfondita dei processi bancari, delle operazioni, dei prodotti e dei sistemi, AML e sanzioni; - Capacità di affrontare più questioni contemporaneamente; - Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente, prendere decisioni e impostare le priorità; - Pragmatic e soluzioni orientate; - Forte capacità analitiche e di comunicazione; - Fluente in francese e inglese; # Cosa# offrono - Swiss Residence: Mandatory ## Core Competencies - Aderenza ai valori dell'azienda: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Rispetto alle normative e alle direttive interne ## Contatto - Nessuna informazione di contatto fornita.
descriptionByLocale.en: Mission Ensure detection and monitoring of high-risk transactions in an AML perspective and in respect of applicable laws and regulations as well as internal policies and procedures. Execute other Compliance controls and monitoring tasks. Main responsibilities Perform second level of control on high-risk alerts generated by the transaction monitoring system to identify suspicious activities and potential financial crime risks; Assess completeness and accuracy of the RM explanations on AML alerts and analyze plausibility of information and supportive documentation on file; Carry out additional clarifications and investigations on suspicious payments or patterns; Review transaction requests and manage daily operations on blocked accounts; Periodical review of blockages’ reasons and necessity; Provide guidance, training, support and relevant information to Relationship Managers on daily basis; Liaise with relevant stakeholders such as Compliance Market Expert, Business Risk Manager, Legal, Risk, Credit Department, and Operations, to ensure a holistic approach; Prepare internal memorandums and present the case to the dedicated committee when required; Provide recommendations for enhancing monitoring processes and assist with Compliance projects and initiatives. Your Profile Degree in Law, Economics, Finance, Business Administration or equivalent. A minimum of 2 years’ experience as Compliance, KYC and AML in Private Banking or similar role; In-depth knowledge of banking processes, operations, products and systems, AML and sanctions; Capacity to deal with several matters simultaneously; Ability to work independently, take decisions and set priorities; Pragmatic and solution oriented; Strong analytical and communication skills; Fluent in French and English; additional languages are considered an asset; Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility. Others Swiss Residence: Mandatory Core Competencies : Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with regulations and internal directives
descriptionByLocale.de: Missione Sicherstellung der Erkennung und Überwachung von Risikotransaktionen in einer AML-Perspektive und in Bezug auf geltende Gesetze und Vorschriften sowie interne Richtlinien und Verfahren. Weitere Compliance-Kontrollen und Überwachungsaufgaben ausführen. Li Mansioni - Führen Sie die zweite Ebene der Kontrolle über Hochrisikowarnungen, die durch das Transaktionsüberwachungssystem erzeugt werden, um verdächtige Aktivitäten und potenzielle finanzielle Kriminalitätsrisiken zu identifizieren; - Vollständigkeit und Genauigkeit der RM-Erklärungen über AML-Benachrichtigungen und analysieren Sie die Plausibilität von Informationen und unterstützende Dokumentation in der Datei; - Markt zusätzliche Klärungen und Untersuchungen über verdächtige Zahlungen oder Muster; - Überprüfung von Transaktionsanforderungen Requisiti - Abschluss in Recht, Wirtschaft, Finanzen, Betriebswirtschaft oder gleichwertig. - Mindestens 2 Jahre Erfahrung als Compliance, KYC und AML in Private Banking oder ähnliche Rolle; - Vertiefte Kenntnisse von Bankprozessen, Operationen, Produkten und Systemen, AML und Sanktionen; - Fähigkeit, mit mehreren Angelegenheiten gleichzeitig zu umgehen; - Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten, Entscheidungen zu treffen und Prioritäten zu setzen; - Pragmatische und Lösung orientiert; - Starke analytische und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten; - fließen in Französisch und Englisch; Zusatzsprachen gelten als Asset; Â Cosa offriamo - Swiss Residence: Mandatory Â Core Competencies - Adherence to the company’s values: Dedication, Conviction, Agility and Responsibility - Compliance with Regulations and internen Directives Â Contatto - Keine Kontaktinformationen zur Verfügung gestellt.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missione Assurer la détection et la surveillance des transactions à risque élevé dans une perspective de LAM et en ce qui concerne les lois et règlements applicables ainsi que les politiques et procédures internes. Exécuter d'autres tâches de contrôle et de surveillance de la conformité. ## Mansioni - Effectuer un deuxième niveau de contrôle sur les alertes à risque élevé générées par le système de surveillance des opérations afin d'identifier les activités suspectes et les risques potentiels de criminalité financière; - Évaluer l'exhaustivité et l'exactitude des explications de la RM sur les alertes à LAM et analyser la plausibilité de l'information et de la documentation de soutien dans les dossiers; - Effectuer des clarifications et des enquêtes supplémentaires sur les paiements ou les modèles suspects; - Examiner les demandes de transaction et gérer les opérations quotidiennes sur les comptes bloqués; - Examen périodique des raisons et de la nécessité des blocages; - Fournir des conseils, de la formation, du soutien et de l'information pertinente aux gestionnaires des relations au quotidien; - Assurer la liaison avec les intervenants pertinents tels que l'expert en conformité du marché, le gestionnaire des risques d'affaires, le service juridique, du risque, du crédit et des opérations, afin d'assurer une approche globale; - Préparer des mémoires internes et présenter le cas au comité spécialisé au besoin; - Fournir des recommandations pour améliorer les processus de surveillance et aider aux projets et initiatives de conformité. ## Requisiti - Diplôme en droit, économie, finances, administration des affaires ou équivalent. - Une expérience d'au moins 2 ans comme conformité, KYC et AML dans le secteur bancaire privé ou un rôle similaire; - une connaissance approfondie des processus, opérations, produits et systèmes bancaires, AML et sanctions; - la capacité de traiter simultanément plusieurs questions; - la capacité de travailler de façon indépendante, de prendre des décisions et de fixer des priorités; - le pragmatisme et la solution; - de solides compétences en analyse et en communication; - la fluidité en français et en anglais; les langues supplémentaires sont considérées comme un atout; - l'adhésion aux valeurs de l'entreprise: la dédicace, la conviction, l'agilité et la responsabilité. ## Cosa offriamo - Résidence suisse : Obligatoire ## Compétences de base - Adhérence aux valeurs de l'entreprise : Dédicace, condamnation, agilité et responsabilité - Conformité aux règlements et directives internes ## Contatto - Aucune information de contact fournie.

jobs.source: Union Bancaire Privée Oracle HCM API
